# Migration Report: characters\script\attachments.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    Time = math.random(0,720)
+    TimeSinceLastTick = 0
+    initEnvironment()
+    SCRIPTSHUTDOWN = false
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if not SCRIPTSHUTDOWN then
+    	TimeSinceLastTick = TimeSinceLastTick - dt
+    	if TimeSinceLastTick <= 0 then
+    		TimeSinceLastTick = 1
+    		TimeTick(dt)		
+    	end
+
+    	if Time >= 1440 then
+    		Time = 0
+    	end
+    	if InputDown('9') then
+    		Time = Time + 1 
+    		initEnvironment()
+    	end
+    	--[[if InputPressed('8') then
+    		SCRIPTSHUTDOWN = true
+    		Spawn('<script pos="0.0 0.0 0.0" rot="0.0 0.0 0.0" file="MOD/Data/Scripts/DaynightCycle.lua"/>',Transform())
+    		SetInt('savegame.mod.Island.Time',Time, true)
+    	end]]
+end
+
```

# Migration Report: characters\script\merlin\animation.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/characters\script\merlin\animation.lua
+++ patched/characters\script\merlin\animation.lua
@@ -1,16 +1,11 @@
-#include "script/common.lua"
-
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
-model = {}
-model.animator = 0
-
-
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
-function init()
-	model.animator = FindAnimator()
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    model.animator = FindAnimator()
 end
 
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        MakeRagdoll(model.animator)
+    end
+end
 
-function tick(dt)
-    MakeRagdoll(model.animator)
-end

```

```diff
-function GetBodyVoxelCount(Body)
-	local Count = 0

---[[function PutBodyShapesInNewBody(Body)

-	end

-	SetBodyVelocity(NewBody, Vec(0,-1,0))

-function RecieveHitData(Animator, HitPos, BodyPart, Damage)
-	local InjuryTypes = {'Bleed', 'Normal'}
-	local Body = GetEntityChildren(Animator, BodyPart, false, "body")[1]
-	for Key, NPC in pairs(NPCS) do
-		if NPC.Animator == Animator then
-			table.insert(NPC.DamageInfo,{
-				['Done'] = false,
-				['LocalTransform'] = TransformToLocalTransform(GetBodyTransform(Body), Transform(HitPos, QuatEuler())),
-				['Type'] = InjuryTypes[math.random(1,#InjuryTypes)],
-				['Body'] = Body,
-				['BodyPart'] = BodyPart,
-				['Damage'] = Damage,
-				
-			})
-			break
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function GetClosestEnemyNPC(CurTeam, origin, maxDistance)
-	local closest = nil
-	local closestKey = nil
-	local closestTeam = nil
-	local closestDist = maxDistance or 999
-
-	for teamName, team in pairs(Teams) do
-		if teamName ~= CurTeam then
-			for npcKey, _ in pairs(team) do
-				if npcKey ~= 'player' then
-					local npc = NPCS[npcKey]
-					if npc and npc.HealthInfo.Health > 0 then
-						local npcPos = GetAnimatorTransform(npc.Animator).pos
-						local dist = VecLength(VecSub(npcPos, origin))
-						if dist < closestDist then
-							closest = npc
-							closestKey = npcKey
-							closestTeam = teamName
-							closestDist = dist
-						end
-					end
-				else
-					local playerPos = GetPlayerTransform().pos
-					local dist = VecLength(VecSub(playerPos, origin))
-					if dist < closestDist then
-						closest = 'player'
-						closestKey = npcKey
-						closestTeam = teamName
-						closestDist = dist
-					end
-				
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-
-	if closest then
-		return {
-			NPC = closest,
-			Key = closestKey,
-			Team = closestTeam
-		}
-	else
-		return nil
-	end
-end
-
-function GetRandomTarget(CurTeam)
-	ViableTargets = {}
-	for k,v in pairs(Teams) do
-		if k ~= CurTeam then
-			for k2,v2 in pairs(v) do
-				if v2 then
-					table.insert(ViableTargets, {k2, k})
-				end
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if #ViableTargets > 0 then
-		return ViableTargets[math.random(1,#ViableTargets)]
-	else
-		return 'Done'
-	end
-end
-
-function GetClosestPointOnPathToNPC(Path,NPC)
-	local CurPoint = 0
-	local CurLength = 100000000
-	for i=1,GetPathLength(Path), 1 do
-		local length = VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,GetPathPoint(i, Path)))
-		if length < CurLength then
-			CurPoint = i
-			CurLength = length
-		end
-	end
-
-	return CurPoint
-end
-
-function GetClosestVehicle(NPC)
-	local allvehicles = FindVehicles('',true)
-	local closestdist = 900
-	local vehicle = nil
-	for i=1,#allvehicles do
-		if not Vehicles[allvehicles[i]] then
-			Vehicles[allvehicles[i]] = {
-				['HasDriver'] = false,
-				['PassengerInfo'] = {},
-				['Full'] = false,
-				['MaxOccupancy'] = 1,
-				['Occupancy'] = 0,
-			}	
-		end
-		if not Vehicles[allvehicles[i]].Full then
-			if VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,GetVehicleTransform(allvehicles[i]).pos)) < closestdist then
-				closestdist = VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,GetVehicleTransform(allvehicles[i]).pos))
-				vehicle = allvehicles[i]
-			end	
-		end
-	end
-	if Vehicle ~= 0 then
-		return vehicle
-	else
-		return false
-	end
-end
-
-function GetRandomPointOnBody(body)
-    local shapes = GetBodyShapes(body)
-    if #shapes == 0 then return nil end
-
-    local shape = shapes[math.random(1, #shapes)]
-	if GetShapeVoxelCount(shape) > 0 then
-		xsize, ysize, zsize, scale = GetShapeSize(shape)
-		
-		local x = math.random(0, xsize - 1)
-		local y = math.random(0, ysize - 1)
-		local z = math.random(0, zsize - 1)
-
-		local localPos = Vec(x * scale, y * scale, z * scale)
-		local worldPos = TransformToParentPoint(GetShapeWorldTransform(shape), localPos)
-
-		return worldPos
-	end
-end
-
-function GetSquadLeader(team,NPC)
-	local leaders = {}
-	for k,v in pairs(Teams[team].Squads) do
-		if v.LivingLeader and VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(k).pos, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) <= 35 then
-			table.insert(leaders,k)
-		end
-	end
-	if #leaders > 0 then
-		return leaders[math.random(1,#leaders)]
-	else
-		return 'none'
-	end
-end
-
-function TeamHasSquad(team,NPC)
-	local amount = 0
-	if Teams[team].Squads then
-		for k,v in pairs(Teams[team].Squads) do
-			--DebugPrint({'n',v})
-			if v.LivingLeader and VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(k).pos, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) <= 35 then
-				amount = amount + 1
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if amount > 0 then
-		return true
-	else
-		return false
-	end
-end
-

-	ShowNPCDebug = true
-	Interactive = false
-	EditingValue = ''
-	EditingNPC = 0
-	TempDisplay = ''
-end

-initDrawVariables()

-						UiTranslate(x,y)
-						UiAlign('center middle')
-						UiPush()
-							local w, h, x, y
-							UiPush()
-								UiTranslate(0,30000)
-								UiFont("bold.ttf", 26)
-								w, h, x, y = UiText('Team : '.. NPC.Team ..'')	
-							UiPop()

-							if inrect then
-								UiColor(0,0,0)
-							else
-								UiColor(1,1,1)
-							end
-							UiImageBox("ui/common/box-solid-6.png", w+20, 40, 6, 6)
-							if inrect then
-								UiColor(1,1,1)
-							else
-								UiColor(0,0,0)
-							end
-							UiFont("bold.ttf", 26)
-							UiTranslate(0,0)

-								UiText('Team : '.. NPC.Team ..'')
-							else
-								UiText('Team : '.. TempDisplay ..'|')

-								EditingValue = 'Team'

-									NPC.Team = TempDisplay

-									EditingNPC = 0
-									TempDisplay = ''

-									TempDisplay = string.sub(TempDisplay,1,#TempDisplay-1)
-								else								
-									TempDisplay = ''.. TempDisplay ..''.. keypress ..''
-								end
-							end
-						UiPop()
-					end
-				UiPop()
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end]]

-								{Vec(0.19,0,0),'run_l'},
-							}
-							end

-							}

-
-						NPC.MovementInfo.Velocity = VecAdd(NPC.MovementInfo.Velocity, TransformToParentVec(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator), VecScale(NPC.MovementInfo.StrafeDirection,NPC.MovementInfo.SpeedMutliplier)))

-					NPC.Transform.pos = VecAdd(VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,Vec(0,0.5,0)), VecScale(Vec(0,-1,0), StandDist))

-						PlayAnimationLoop(NPC.Animator,"run_bwd",-VecNormalize(TransformToLocalVec(NPC.Transform,NPC.MovementInfo.Velocity))[3])

-				
-			end,
-			['Pathing'] = function(dt, NPC)
-				NPC.PathInfo.Timer = NPC.PathInfo.Timer - dt

-	['Infantry_Squad_Member'] = {
-		['Modules'] = {
-			['Pathing'] = function(dt, NPC)
-				NPC.PathInfo.Timer = NPC.PathInfo.Timer - dt
-				NPC.TargetInfo.TargetDistance = VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.SquadInfo.Leader).pos))
-				DebugLine(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.SquadInfo.Leader).pos,GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,1,1,1,1)
-				if not NPC.PathInfo.HasPath or NPC.PathInfo.Timer <= 0 and NPC.StartDelay <= 0 then
-					QueryRejectAnimator(NPC.Animator)
-					QueryRejectBody(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body)
-					PathPlannerQuery(NPC.PathInfo.ID, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos, VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.SquadInfo.Leader).pos,NPC.SquadInfo.Offset), 30, 4, "standard")
-					NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = true
-					NPC.PathInfo.Timer = math.random()/5
-					NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint = 3	
-				end
-
-				-- Movement logic
-				if GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'done' and VecLength(VecSub(VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.SquadInfo.Leader).pos,NPC.SquadInfo.Offset), GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) > 5 then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Running'
-				elseif GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'done' and VecLength(VecSub(VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.SquadInfo.Leader).pos,NPC.SquadInfo.Offset), GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) < 5 then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Idle'
-				elseif GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'fail' then
-					NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = false
-				end
-
-				-- Combat mode if enemy target is near
-				if (NPC.TargetInfo.CanSee or NPC.TargetInfo.LastSeen <= 1.5) and NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Firing'
-				end
-
-				if VecLength(VecSub(GetPathPoint(NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) <= 1 then
-					NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint = math.min(NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint + 3, GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID))
-				end
-
-				if NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint+3 >= GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID) and not GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'busy' then
-					NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = false
-				end
-				if Debug or NPC.Animator == SpectatingInfo.Target then
-					for i=3,GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID), 3 do
-						if i > NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint then
-							DebugLine(GetPathPoint(i-3, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetPathPoint(i, NPC.PathInfo.ID), 1,0,0,1)
-						else
-							DebugLine(GetPathPoint(i-3, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetPathPoint(i, NPC.PathInfo.ID), 0,1,0,1)
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			end
-			
-		},
-
-		['tick'] = function(dt,NPC)
-			if not NPC.SquadInfo.Leader then
-				local leader = GetSquadLeader(NPC.Team,NPC)
-				if leader == 'none' then
-					NPC.Class = 'Infantry'
-				else
-					NPC.SquadInfo.Leader = leader
-					NPC.SquadInfo.Squad = Teams[NPC.Team].Squads[NPC.SquadInfo.Leader]
-					NPC.SquadInfo.Squad.Members[NPC.Animator] = Teams[NPC.Team][NPC.Animator]
-				end
-			end
-			if not NPC.SquadInfo.SquadInitiated then
-				NPC.SquadInfo.SquadInitiated = true
-				if NPC.SquadInfo.Role == 1 then
-					NPC.PathInfo.ID = NPC.SquadInfo.Squad.PathInfo.ID
-				end
-			end
-			if not Teams[NPC.Team].Squads[NPC.SquadInfo.Leader].LivingLeader then
-				NPC.Class = 'Infantry'
-			end
-			DrawAnimatorOutline(NPC.Animator,1,0,0,1)
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Targeting(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.TargetVerification(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Shooting(dt,NPC)
-			
-			if InputPressed('y') then
-				NPC.Class = 'Infantry'
-			end
-		end,
-
-		['postUpdate'] = function(dt,NPC)
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry_Squad_Member.Modules.Pathing(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Movement(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Looking(dt,NPC)

-			SetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator, NPC.Transform)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Weapon_Movement_Animation(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Weapon_Hand_Handler(dt,NPC)
-		end,	
-	
-
-	},

-	['PlayerAlly_Infantry'] = {
-		['Modules'] = {
-			['Targeting'] = function(dt, NPC)
-				NPC.TargetInfo.LastSeen = NPC.TargetInfo.LastSeen + dt
-
-				if not NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget then
-					-- Find enemy NPCs only (excluding player)
-					local Target = GetClosestEnemyNPC(NPC.Team, NPC.Transform.pos, 40)
-					if Target then
-						NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget = true
-						NPC.TargetInfo.Type = 'NPC'
-						NPC.TargetInfo.Target = Target.Key
-						NPC.TargetInfo.Team = Target.Team
-						NPC.TargetInfo.MinDist = 5
-					end
-				end
-
-				-- Validate current target
-				if NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget then
-					if not Teams[NPC.TargetInfo.Team][NPC.TargetInfo.Target] then
-						NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget = false
-						NPC.TargetInfo.Target = nil
-						NPC.TargetInfo.Team = nil
-					end
-				end
-
-				-- Update target transform
-				if NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget and NPC.TargetInfo.Type == 'NPC' then
-					NPC.TargetInfo.Transform = GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.TargetInfo.Target)
-				end
-
-				-- Follow the player as the "leader"
-				
-			end,
-			['Pathing'] = function(dt, NPC)
-				NPC.PathInfo.Timer = NPC.PathInfo.Timer - dt
-
-				local distToPlayer = VecLength(VecSub(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos, GetPlayerTransform().pos))
-				NPC.TargetInfo.TargetDistance = distToPlayer
-				
-				DebugLine(GetPlayerTransform().pos,GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,1,1,1,1)
-				if not NPC.PathInfo.HasPath or NPC.PathInfo.Timer <= 0 and NPC.StartDelay <= 0 then
-						QueryRejectAnimator(NPC.Animator)
-						QueryRejectBody(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body)
-						PathPlannerQuery(NPC.PathInfo.ID, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos, GetPlayerTransform().pos, 30, 4, "standard")
-						NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = true
-						NPC.PathInfo.Timer = math.random()
-						NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint = 3	
-				end
-
-				-- Movement logic
-				if GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'done' and VecLength(VecSub(GetPlayerTransform().pos, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) > 5 then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Running'
-				elseif GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'done' and VecLength(VecSub(GetPlayerTransform().pos, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) < 5 then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Idle'
-				elseif GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'fail' then
-					NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = false
-				end
-
-				-- Combat mode if enemy target is near
-				if (NPC.TargetInfo.CanSee or NPC.TargetInfo.LastSeen <= 1.5) and NPC.TargetInfo.HasTarget then
-					NPC.MovementInfo.State = 'Firing'
-				end
-
-				if VecLength(VecSub(GetPathPoint(NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos)) <= 1 then
-					NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint = math.min(NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint + 3, GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID))
-				end
-
-				if NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint+3 >= GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID) and not GetPathState(NPC.PathInfo.ID) == 'busy' then
-					NPC.PathInfo.HasPath = false
-				end
-				if Debug or NPC.Animator == SpectatingInfo.Target then
-					for i=3,GetPathLength(NPC.PathInfo.ID), 3 do
-						if i > NPC.PathInfo.CurrentPoint then
-							DebugLine(GetPathPoint(i-3, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetPathPoint(i, NPC.PathInfo.ID), 1,0,0,1)
-						else
-							DebugLine(GetPathPoint(i-3, NPC.PathInfo.ID), GetPathPoint(i, NPC.PathInfo.ID), 0,1,0,1)
-						end
-					end
-				end
-			end,
-		},
-
-		['tick'] = function(dt,NPC)
-			NPC_Logic.PlayerAlly_Infantry.Modules.Targeting(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.TargetVerification(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Shooting(dt,NPC)
-			
-			if InputPressed('y') then
-				NPC.Class = 'Infantry'
-			end
-		end,
-
-		['postUpdate'] = function(dt,NPC)
-			NPC_Logic.PlayerAlly_Infantry.Modules.Pathing(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Movement(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Looking(dt,NPC)
-			
-			SetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator, NPC.Transform)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Weapon_Movement_Animation(dt,NPC)
-			
-			NPC_Logic.Infantry.Modules.Weapon_Hand_Handler(dt,NPC)
-		end,
-	}
-}
-
-
-function postUpdate(dt)
-	do
-		for Key, NPC in pairs(NPCS) do
-			NPC.StartDelay = NPC.StartDelay - dt
-			--DebugPrint(NPC.TargetInfo.LastSeen)
-			--[[if InputPressed('p') then
-				for i=2,#GetBoneNames(NPC.Animator) do
-
-					PutBodyShapesInNewBody(GetBoneBody(NPC.Animator, GetBoneNames(NPC.Animator)[i]))
-
-				end
-			end]]
-			if InputPressed('y') then
-				if not NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding then
-					local closestvehicle = GetClosestVehicle(NPC)
-					if closestvehicle then
-						if not Vehicles[closestvehicle].HasDriver then
-							NPC.VehicleInfo.Driver = true
-						end
-						NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding = true
-						NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle = closestvehicle
-						NPC.VehicleInfo.CurPassenger = Vehicles[closestvehicle].Occupancy + 1
-						Vehicles[closestvehicle].Occupancy = Vehicles[closestvehicle].Occupancy + 1
-						if Vehicles[closestvehicle].Occupancy == Vehicles[closestvehicle].MaxOccupancy then
-							Vehicles[closestvehicle].Full = true
-						end
-						
-					end
-				else
-					if NPC.VehicleInfo.Driver and NPC.VehicleInfo.CurPassenger == 1 then
-						NPC.VehicleInfo.Driver = false
-						Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].HasDriver = false
-					end
-					NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding = false
-					Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].Occupancy = Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].Occupancy - 1
-					SetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator,GetVehicleLocationWorldTransform(NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle, "exit"))
-					if Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].Occupancy < Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].MaxOccupancy then
-						Vehicles[NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle].Full = false
-					end
-					NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle = 0
-				end
-			end
-			if NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding then
-				if NPC.VehicleInfo.Driver and NPC.VehicleInfo.CurPassenger == 1 then
-					locomotion_vehicle_ik(NPC.Animator, GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator), dt, NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle,true)
-				else
-					SetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator,GetVehicleTrans(NPC.Animator,dt,NPC.VehicleInfo.Vehicle,nil,NPC.VehicleInfo))
-				end
-				
-				
-				for _,bone in pairs(GetBoneNames(NPC.Animator)) do
-					local bTrans = GetBoneWorldTransform(NPC.Animator,bone)
-					DebugCross(bTrans.pos)
-					DebugLine(bTrans.pos,TransformToParentPoint(bTrans,Vec(0.05,0,0)),1,0,0)
-					DebugLine(bTrans.pos,TransformToParentPoint(bTrans,Vec(0,0.05,0)),0,1,0)
-					DebugLine(bTrans.pos,TransformToParentPoint(bTrans,Vec(0,0,0.05)),0,0,1)
-				end
-			end
-
-			if not NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding then
-				NPC_Logic[NPC.Class].postUpdate(dt,NPC)
-			end
-
-			if NPC.HealthInfo.Health <= 0 or NPC.MovementInfo.FallTime > 5 or NPC.MovementInfo.SwimTime > 30 then
-				NPC.Alive = false
-			end
-
-			if not NPC.Alive then
-				if GetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod') then
-					SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money', GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money') + 125)
-				end
-				if Teams[NPC.Team].Squads then
-					Teams[NPC.Team].Squads[NPC.Animator].LivingLeader = false
-				end
-				if NPC.SquadInfo.Squad then
-					NPC.SquadInfo.Squad.Members[NPC.Animator] = false
-				end
-				for i=1,#NPC.Bodies do
-					local joints = GetBodyJoints(NPC.Bodies[i])
-					for j=1,#joints do
-						SetProperty(joints[i], 'rotspring', 90)
-						SetProperty(joints[i], 'rotstrength', 3)
-					end
-				end
-				SetTag(NPC.Animator, "Dead")
-				MakeRagdoll(NPC.Animator)
-				Teams[NPC.Team][NPC.Animator] = false
-				table.insert(DeadNPCS, NPC.Animator)
-				NPCS[Key] = nil
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function loadNPCWeaponInfo(NPC)
-	local Entities = Spawn('<body><voxbox size="1 1 1" material="metal" tags="invisible"/></body>',GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator))
-	SetBodyDynamic(Entities[i],true)
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.HasGun = true
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Body = Entities[1]
-	SetTag(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body, 'TABSGUNENTITY')
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.attachmentHandler = deepcopy(GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].attachmentHandler)
-	LoadTool(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body, GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].BasePrefab, NPC.WeaponInfo.weaponHandler, NPC.WeaponInfo.attachmentHandler)
-	local bs = GetBodyShapes(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body)
-	for k=1,#bs do
-		SetTag(bs[k], 'attachment')
-		SetTag(bs[k], 'unbreakable')
-		SetTag(bs[k], 'nocull')
-		SetTag(bs[k], 'bone')
-	end
-	SetTag(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body, 'TABSNPCGUNACTIVE')
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Sound = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].ShootSound or 'MOD/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g36/g36_0.ogg'
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Offset = Vec(unpack(Split(GetTagValue(Entities[1], 'Offset'), ','))) or Vec(0,0,0)
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Running = Vec(unpack(Split(GetTagValue(Entities[1], 'RunningOffset'), ','))) or Vec(0,0,0)
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Cartridge = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].Cartridge
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.FireRate = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].FireRate
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.HandPositions.Right = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].RightHandPos
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.HandPositions.Left = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].LeftHandPos
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Barrel = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].shootPos
-	NPC.MovementInfo.SpeedMutliplier = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].Weight or 1
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Disposable = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].Disposable or false
-	NPC.WeaponInfo.Accuracy = GunInfo[NPC.WeaponInfo.Gun].Accuracy or 0.05
-end
-
-function FireParticle(pos)
-	for i=1, 2 do
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleType("smoke")
-		ParticleCollide(0)
-		ParticleRadius(0.06)
-		ParticleDrag(0.5)
-		ParticleEmissive(0, 0)
-		ParticleColor(.2,.2,.2)
-		ParticleGravity(rnd(2,6))
-		ParticleAlpha(0.6, 0.9)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos, Vec(rnd(-0.3,0.3),rnd(-0.3,0.2),rnd(-0.3,0.3))), Vec(rnd(-2,2),rnd(0,1),rnd(-2,2)), 4)
-
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleTile(5)
-		ParticleType("smoke")
-		ParticleCollide(0)
-		ParticleRadius(0.05, 0.15)
-		ParticleDrag(0.5)
-		ParticleEmissive(2, 0)
-		ParticleColor(.9,.3,.15)
-		ParticleGravity(rnd(4,9))
-		ParticleAlpha(1, 0.5)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos, Vec(rnd(-0.3,0.3),rnd(-0.3,0.2),rnd(-0.3,0.3))), Vec(rnd(-2,2),rnd(0,1),rnd(-2,2)), 1)
-
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleTile(8)
-		ParticleType("smoke")
-		ParticleCollide(0)
-		ParticleRadius(0.03, 0.15)
-		ParticleDrag(1)
-		ParticleEmissive(2, 0)
-		ParticleColor(0.9,.6,.3)
-		ParticleGravity(rnd(3,6))
-		ParticleAlpha(1, 0.5)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos, Vec(rnd(-0.3,0.3),rnd(-0.3,0.2),rnd(-0.3,0.3))), Vec(rnd(-1,1),rnd(0,0.5),rnd(-1,1)), 2)
-
-		ParticleReset()
-		ParticleType("smoke")
-		ParticleCollide(0)
-		ParticleTile(5)
-		ParticleRadius(0.05, 0.12)
-		ParticleDrag(0.5)
-		ParticleEmissive(2, 0)
-		ParticleColor(1,.5,.3)
-		ParticleGravity(rnd(4,9))
-		ParticleAlpha(1, 0.5)
-		SpawnParticle(VecAdd(pos, Vec(rnd(-0.3,0.3),rnd(-0.3,0.2),rnd(-0.3,0.3))), Vec(rnd(-2,2),rnd(0,1),rnd(-2,2)), 0.8)
-	end
-	PointLight(pos, 255, .20, .0130, 5)
-end
-
-function clamp(val, min, max)
-    return math.max(min, math.min(max, val))
-end
-
-function tick(dt)
-	local AmountNPCS = 0
-	for k, v in pairs(NPCS) do
-		if v.Team ~= 'Player' then
-			AmountNPCS = AmountNPCS + 1
-		end
-	end	
-	
-	SetInt('game.tabs.npc.handler.amount.npcs', AmountNPCS)
-	if Debug then
-		for i=1,#DebugPoints do
-			DebugCross(DebugPoints[i], 1,0,0,1)
-		end
-	end
-	BloodTick(dt)
-	--[[do
-		if InputPressed('9') then SpectatingInfo.Spectating = not SpectatingInfo.Spectating SpectatingInfo.Target = NPCS[math.random(1,#NPCS)].Animator; end
-		if SpectatingInfo.Spectating then
-			SpectatorTick(dt)
-		end
-	end]]
-	do
-		for Key, NPC in pairs(NPCS) do
-			for j=1,#NPC.DamageInfo do
-				if not NPC.DamageInfo[j].Done then
-					if NPC.DamageInfo[j].Type == 'Bleed' then
-						NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo = {
-							Timer = -math.random(3,8) + math.random() - math.random() - math.random() + math.random()/2,
-							Severity = math.random(1,5),
-							Closed = false,
-						}
-						NPC.WeaponInfo.CurRecoil = VecAdd(NPC.WeaponInfo.CurRecoil,Vec(math.random(-20,20),math.random(-20,20),0))
-					end
-					
-					for k=1,math.random(clamp(math.floor(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Damage / 15), 2, 6), clamp(math.floor(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Damage / 8), 4, 9)) do
-						BloodSplatter(NPC.DamageInfo[j], NPC, Vec(randomFloat(-1,1),randomFloat(-0.25,1.25),randomFloat(-1,1)), randomFloat(1,5))
-					end
-					local NPCOGHealth = NPC.HealthInfo.Health
-					if NPC.DamageInfo[j].BodyPart == 'head' then
-						NPC.HealthInfo.Health = NPC.HealthInfo.Health - NPC.DamageInfo[j].Damage + math.random(-5,5) * 1.75
-					else
-						NPC.HealthInfo.Health = NPC.HealthInfo.Health - NPC.DamageInfo[j].Damage + math.random(-32,5)
-					end
-					TABSSound('MOD/TABS/sounds/npcs/hit/Soldier_Emotes_SoldierHit_Wave ('.. math.random(1,73) ..').ogg',TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Body), NPC.DamageInfo[j].LocalTransform).pos,1000)
-					NPC.DamageInfo[j].Done = true
-				end
-				if NPC.DamageInfo[j].Type == 'Bleed' then
-					if NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Closed then
-						--if Debug or NPC.Animator == SpectatingInfo.Target then
-							--DebugCross(TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Body), NPC.DamageInfo[j].LocalTransform).pos, 0,1,0,1)
-						--end
-					else
-						if math.random() <= 0.05 then
-							for k=1,math.random(1,3) do
-								BloodSplatter(NPC.DamageInfo[j], NPC, Vec(randomFloat(-0.75,0.75),randomFloat(-0.25,1.5),randomFloat(-0.75,0.75)),randomFloat(-0,1.5))
-							end
-						end
-						--if Debug or NPC.Animator == SpectatingInfo.Target then
-							--DebugCross(TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Body), NPC.DamageInfo[j].LocalTransform).pos, 1,0,0,1)
-						--end
-					end
-					NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Timer = NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Timer - dt
-					if NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Timer <= 0 and not NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Closed then
-						NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Timer = (math.random(3,8) + math.random() - math.random() - math.random())/NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Severity/1.6
-						NPC.HealthInfo.Health = NPC.HealthInfo.Health - math.random(1,3)*NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Severity
-						local KillMultiplier = 0
-						if NPC.HealthInfo.Health <= 0 then
-							KillMultiplier = math.random(5,14)
-						end
-						for k=1,math.random(math.ceil(3*NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Severity/1.5)+KillMultiplier,math.ceil(15*NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Severity/1.5)+KillMultiplier) do
-							BloodSplatter(NPC.DamageInfo[j], NPC, Vec(randomFloat(-1,1),randomFloat(-1,1),randomFloat(-1,1)),randomFloat(0,2))
-						end
-						if math.random(1,25*NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Severity) <= 2 then
-							NPC.DamageInfo[j].BleedInfo.Closed = true
-						end
-					end
-				else
-					--if Debug or NPC.Animator == SpectatingInfo.Target then
-						--DebugCross(TransformToParentTransform(GetBodyTransform(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Body), NPC.DamageInfo[j].LocalTransform).pos, 1,1,1,1)
-					--end
-				end
-				--DrawBodyOutline(NPC.DamageInfo[j].Body,1,0,0,1)
-
-
-			end
-			for Bodypart, BodypartInfo in pairs(NPC.HealthInfo.BodyParts) do
-				if GetBodyVoxelCount(BodypartInfo.Body) <= BodypartInfo.VoxelCount/3 and Bodypart ~= 'Bip001' and BodypartInfo.VoxelCount >= 4 then
-					RecieveHitData(NPC.Animator, GetBodyTransform(BodypartInfo.Body).pos, Bodypart, 5*BodypartInfo.VoxelCount)
-				end	
-				if not BodypartInfo.OnFire then
-					local hit, pos = QueryClosestFire(GetBodyTransform(BodypartInfo.Body).pos, 1)
-					local disttofire = VecLength(VecSub(pos,GetBodyTransform(BodypartInfo.Body).pos))
-					if hit and disttofire <= 2 then
-						BodypartInfo.OnFire = true
-					end
-				end
-				if BodypartInfo.OnFire then
-					if math.random() <= 0.25 then
-						FireParticle(GetRandomPointOnBody(BodypartInfo.Body))
-					end
-					DebugCross(GetRandomPointOnBody(BodypartInfo.Body))
-					if math.random() <= 0.25 then
-						PaintRGBA(GetRandomPointOnBody(BodypartInfo.Body), randomFloat(0.1,0.2)/math.random(1,3), randomFloat(0.05,0.1), randomFloat(0.05,0.1), randomFloat(0.05,0.1), randomFloat(0.9,1))
-						NPC.HealthInfo.Health = NPC.HealthInfo.Health-0.05
-					end
-					MakeRagdoll(NPC.Animator)
-					NPC.WeaponInfo.Body = nil
-					if NPC.HealthInfo.Health <= 30 then 
-					else
-						SetBodyVelocity(BodypartInfo.Body, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(BodypartInfo.Body),Vec(randomFloat(-0.7,0.7),randomFloat(-0.7,0.7),randomFloat(-0.7,0.7))))
-					end
-					if NPC.HealthInfo.Health <= 0 then
-						QueryRejectAnimator(NPC.Animator)
-						QueryRejectBody(NPC.WeaponInfo.Body)
-						QueryRequire("physical large")
-						local Standing, StandDist, FloorNorm, FloorShape = QueryRaycast(VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(NPC.Animator).pos,Vec(0,1,0)),Vec(0,-1,0),1.5,0.5)
-						for Bodypart2, BodypartInfo2 in pairs(NPC.HealthInfo.BodyParts) do
-							for i=1,#BodypartInfo2.Shapes do
-								SetShapeBody(BodypartInfo2.Shapes[i], GetShapeBody(FloorShape), TransformToLocalTransform(GetBodyTransform(GetShapeBody(FloorShape)), GetShapeWorldTransform(BodypartInfo2.Shapes[i])))
-							end
-						end
-						Delete(NPC.Animator)
-					end
-				end
-			end
-			if not NPC.VehicleInfo.Riding then
-				NPC_Logic[NPC.Class].tick(dt,NPC)
-			end
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-function TABSSound(path, pos, volume)
-	SendToListener({
-		{
-			FunctionName = "RecieveSoundEvent",
-			Arguments = {
-				{"String", path},
-				{"Vec", pos},
-				{"Number", volume},
-			}
-		},
-	})
-end
-
-function SpectatorTick(dt)
-	--[[SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer = SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer - dt
-	if InputPressed('8') or HasTag(Target, 'Dead') then
-		SpectatingInfo.Target = NPCS[math.random(1,#NPCS)].Animator
-		SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer = math.random(5,12) + math.random()
-		SpectatingInfo.Offset = Vec(math.random(-10,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(-10,10))
-	end
-	if SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer < 0 or InputPressed('7') and SpectatingInfo.Type == 'Overhead'  then
-		SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer = math.random(5,12) + math.random()
-		SpectatingInfo.Offset = Vec(math.random(-10,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(-10,10))
-	end
-	if SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer < 0 or InputPressed('6') and SpectatingInfo.Type == 'Overhead' then
-		SpectatingInfo.RePositionTimer = math.random(5,12) + math.random()
-		SpectatingInfo.Offset = Vec(math.random(-4,4),math.random(1,4),math.random(-4,4))
-	end
-	if InputPressed('5') then
-		if SpectatingInfo.CurType < #SpectatingInfo.Types then
-			SpectatingInfo.CurType = SpectatingInfo.CurType + 1
-		else
-			SpectatingInfo.CurType = 1
-		end
-		SpectatingInfo.Type = SpectatingInfo.Types[SpectatingInfo.CurType]
-	end
-	local TargetPos = Vec()
-	local TargetRot = QuatEuler()
-	if SpectatingInfo.Type == 'Overhead' then
-		TargetPos = VecLerp(GetCameraTransform().pos, VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target).pos, TransformToParentVec(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target),Vec(SpectatingInfo.Offset[1],SpectatingInfo.Offset[2],SpectatingInfo.Offset[3]))), 5*dt)
-		TargetRot = QuatLookAt(GetCameraTransform().pos, VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target).pos, Vec(0,3,0)))
-	elseif SpectatingInfo.Type == 'Eyes' then
-		TargetPos = VecLerp(GetCameraTransform().pos, VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target).pos, TransformToParentVec(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target),Vec(1,2.5,-2.5))), 1*dt)
-		TargetRot = QuatLookAt(GetCameraTransform().pos,VecAdd(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target).pos, TransformToParentVec(GetAnimatorTransform(SpectatingInfo.Target),Vec(0,1.5,2))))
-	end
-
-
-
-	SetCameraTransform(Transform(TargetPos, TargetRot))]]
-end
-
+#version 2
 function BloodSplatter(DamageInfo, NPC, Velocity, Scale)
```

```diff
     local Keys = {
         Main = {
@@ -105,4 +79,26 @@
 
 function SendToListener(TBL)

+

+    Team = GetStringParam('Team', 'Red')
+    if not GetBool('game.tabs.npc.handler.spawned') then
+    	Spawn('<script file="MOD/characters/script/NPC Gameplay Handler.lua"/>')
```

```diff
+    Spawners = FindBodies('NPCSpawner')
+    Walls = FindShapes('MovingWall',true)
+    ShiftWalls()
+end
 
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1,#Spawners do 
+    	local Time = tonumber(GetTagValue(Spawners[i], 'moveTimer')) or 2
+    	--Time = Time - dt
+    	if InputPressed('j') then
+    		Time = 0
+    	end
+    	if Time <= 0 then
+    		SetBodyDynamic(Spawners[i],true)
+    		SetBodyTransform(Spawners[i], Transform(Vec(math.random(-50,50),30,math.random(-50,50))))
+    		Time = math.random(90,360)
+    		ShiftWalls()
+    	end
+    	for j=1,#Walls do 
+    		if VecLength(VecSub(GetShapeWorldTransform(Walls[j]).pos, GetBodyTransform(Spawners[i]).pos)) <= 12 then
+    			SetShapeLocalTransform(Walls[j], Transform(Vec(0,-300,0)))
 
-end+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	local team = GetTagValue(Spawners[i], 'team')
+    	local animators = FindAnimators('',true)
+    	local amountfriendlynpc = 0
+    	for j=#animators,1,-1 do 
+    		if GetTagValue(animators[j], 'Team') == team and not HasTag(animators[j],'Dead') then
+    			amountfriendlynpc = amountfriendlynpc + 1
+    		end	
+    	end	
+    	if amountfriendlynpc <= 3 and math.random() <= 2 then
+    		Spawn(NPCS[team], Transform(VecAdd(GetBodyTransform(Spawners[i]).pos, Vec(math.random(-4,4),30,math.random(-4,4)))))
+
+    	end
+    	SetTag(Spawners[i], 'moveTimer', Time)
+    end
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    if not HasKey('savegame.mod.TABS.WaveMod') then
+    	SetBool('savegame.mod.TABS.WaveMod',true, true)
+    end	
+    if not HasKey('savegame.mod.TABS.NoChangeAttachments') then
+    	SetBool('savegame.mod.TABS.NoChangeAttachments',true, true)
+    end
+    SetPlayerSpawnTransform(Transform(Vec(math.random(-30,30),12,math.random(-30,30)),QuatEuler()))
+    SetBool('level.TABS.NoChangeAttachments',GetBool('savegame.mod.TABS.NoChangeAttachments'), true)
+    SetBool('level.TABS.Game',true, true)
+    SetBool('level.TABS.WaveMod',false, true)
+    SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money',  500, true)
+    SetBool('level.TABS.WaveHandler.NewWave',true, true)
+    Wave = 0
+    WaveTimer = 5
+    NeedWaveTimer = false
+    Walls = FindShapes('MovingWall',true)
+    ReHealth = false
+    ShiftWalls()
+    Deaths = 0
+    colorbalance = { GetPostProcessingProperty('colorbalance') }
+    DesiredColor = Vec(math.random(),math.random(),math.random())
+    GameTimer = 0
+    DebugMenu = false
 end
 
-function draw(dt)
-	if DebugMenu then
-		DebugDraw(dt)
-	end
-	if InputPressed('p') then
-		DebugMenu = not DebugMenu
-	end
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        GameTimer = GameTimer + dt
+        DebugWatch('Player Money',GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money'))
+        DebugWatch('Wave',Wave)
+        DebugWatch('Time',WaveTimer)
+        DebugWatch('Deaths',Deaths)
+        local AmountNPCS = GetInt('game.tabs.npc.handler.amount.npcs')
+        DebugWatch('AmountNPCS', AmountNPCS)
+        if AmountNPCS <= 0 then
+        	WaveTimer = WaveTimer - dt 
+        	if NeedWaveTimer then
+        		WaveTimer = 25
+        		SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money', GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money') + (500*math.max(1,(Wave/2))), true)
+        		NeedWaveTimer = false
+        		GameTimer = 0
+        	end
+        	if WaveTimer <= 0 then
+        		local Types = {
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/German_Soldier_ww2.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Swedish_Soldier_Modern.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/British_Soldier_ww2.xml",
+        		{"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Russian_Soldier.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Russian_Soldier_Heavy.xml"},
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Alashyan_Soldier.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Alashyan_Bandit.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_CW.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Police.xml",
+        		"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_Marpat_CW.xml",
+        		{"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_2_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_3_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_4_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_5_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_6_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_7_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Finnish_Soldier_8_ww2.xml"},
+        		{"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_2_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_3_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_4_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_5_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_6_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_7_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/French_Soldier_8_ww2.xml"},
+        		{"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_2_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_3_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_4_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_5_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_6_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_7_ww2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Soldier_8_ww2.xml"},
+        		{"MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Agent1.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Agent2.xml","MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/John Wick.xml"}
+        		}
+        		local Type = Types[math.random(1,#Types)]
+        		--[[if Wave == 0 then
+        			Type = "MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/American_Police.xml"
+        		end]]
+        		ShiftWalls()
+
+        		--SetBool('level.TABS.WaveHandler.NewWave',true, true)
+        		Wave = Wave + 1
+        		for i=1,math.random(12,18) do 
+        			local newertype = Type 
+        			if type(Type) == 'table' then
+        				newertype = Type[math.random(1,#Type)]
+        			end	
+        			Spawn(newertype, Transform(Vec(math.random(-60,60),50,math.random(-60,60)),QuatEuler()))
+        		end	
+        		NeedWaveTimer = true
+        	end
+        end
+        local RejectShapes = {}
+    end
 end
 
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1,3 do
+    	QueryRequire("physical large")
+    	QueryRejectBody(GetToolBody())
+    	QueryRejectAnimator(GetPlayerAnimator())
+    	for j=1,#RejectShapes do QueryRejectShape(RejectShapes[j]) end
+    	local hit, point, normal, shape = QueryClosestPoint(VecAdd(GetPlayerTransform(playerId).pos,Vec(0,1.5,0)), 5)
+    	if hit and HasTag(shape, 'MovingWall') and not HasTag("noplayermove") then
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(shape, Transform(VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(shape).pos,Vec(0,-0.1*dt,0)),GetShapeLocalTransform(shape).rot))
+    		table.insert(RejectShapes, shape)
+    	end
+    end
+    if GetPlayerHealth(playerId) <= 0 and not ReHealth then
+    	SetPlayerSpawnTransform(Transform(Vec(math.random(-60,60),12,math.random(-60,60)),QuatEuler()))
+    	SetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money', GetInt('level.TABS.WaveHandler.Money')/1.25, true)
+    	ReHealth = true
+    	Deaths = Deaths + 1
+    elseif GetPlayerHealth(playerId) > 0 then 
+    	ReHealth = false
+    end
+    colorbalance = VecLerp(Vec(unpack(colorbalance)),DesiredColor,0.02*dt)
+    SetPostProcessingProperty('colorbalance', colorbalance[1],colorbalance[2],colorbalance[3])
+    if DesiredColor[1] - colorbalance[1] <= 0.05 and DesiredColor[2] - colorbalance[2] <= 0.05 and DesiredColor[3] - colorbalance[3] <= 0.05 then
+    	DesiredColor = Vec(math.random(),math.random(),math.random())
+    end
+    if GameTimer >= 5*60 or AmountNPCS <= 5 then
+    	for i=1,100 do
+    		local wall = math.random(1,#Walls)
+    		SetShapeLocalTransform(Walls[wall], Transform(VecAdd(GetShapeLocalTransform(Walls[wall]).pos,Vec(0,-0.5*dt,0)),GetShapeLocalTransform(Walls[wall]).rot))
+
+    	end
+    end
+    if InputDown('shift') then
+    	ShakeCamera(0.3)
+    	SetPlayerWalkingSpeed(8.0)
+    else
+    	SetPlayerWalkingSpeed(5.0)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    if DebugMenu then
+    	DebugDraw(dt)
+    end
+    if InputPressed('p') then
+    	DebugMenu = not DebugMenu
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: characters\script\NPC_Weapon_Data.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\ground.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\ground.lua
+++ patched/main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\ground.lua
@@ -1,35 +1,29 @@
-file = GetString("file", "testground.png", "script png")
-heightScale = GetInt("scale", 64)
-tileSize = GetInt("tilesize", 128)
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    matRock = CreateMaterial("rock", 0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
+    matDirt = CreateMaterial("dirt", 0.26, 0.23, 0.20, 1, 0, 0.1)
+    matGrass1 = CreateMaterial("unphysical", 0.17, 0.21, 0.15, 1, 0, 0.2)
+    matGrass2 = CreateMaterial("unphysical", 0.19, 0.24, 0.17, 1, 0, 0.2)
+    matTarmac = CreateMaterial("masonry", 0.35, 0.35, 0.35, 1, 0, 0.4)
+    matTarmacTrack = CreateMaterial("masonry", 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1, 0, 0.3)
+    matTarmacLine = CreateMaterial("masonry", 0.6, 0.6, 0.6, 1, 0, 0.6)
+    LoadImage(file)
+    w,h = GetImageSize()
+    local maxSize = tileSize
+    local y0 = 0
+    while y0 < h do
+    	local y1 = y0 + maxSize
+    	if y1 > h then y1 = h end
 
-function init()

-	
-	LoadImage(file)
-	
-	w,h = GetImageSize()
+    	local x0 = 0
+    	while x0 < w do
+    		local x1 = x0 + maxSize
+    		if x1 > w then x1 = w end
+    		Vox(x0, 0, y0)
+    		Heightmap(x0, y0, x1, y1, heightScale, hollow==0)
+    		x0 = x1
+    	end
+    	y0 = y1
+    end
+end
 
-	local maxSize = tileSize
```

# Migration Report: main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\scripts\bell.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\scripts\bell.lua
+++ patched/main\buildings\ww2assets\frenchStenchAssets\scripts\bell.lua
@@ -1,25 +1,35 @@
-
-function init()
-	bellhinge = FindJoint("bellhinge")
-	hingetoggle = false
-	broken = false
-	bellsound = LoadSound("MOD/sound effects/bell-church.ogg")
-	bellbody = FindBody("churchbell")
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    bellhinge = FindJoint("bellhinge")
+    hingetoggle = false
+    broken = false
+    bellbody = FindBody("churchbell")
 end
 
-function update()
-	if IsBodyBroken(bellbody) then
-		broken = true
-	end
-	if not broken then
-		local angle = GetJointMovement(bellhinge)
-		
-		if math.abs(angle) > 20 and not hingetoggle then -- debounce 
-			hingetoggle = true
-			--DebugPrint("BONG")
-			PlaySound(bellsound, GetBodyTransform(bellbody).pos, 20.0)
-		elseif math.abs(angle) < 20 and hingetoggle then
-			hingetoggle = false
-		end
-	end
-end+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if IsBodyBroken(bellbody) then
+        	broken = true
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    bellsound = LoadSound("MOD/sound effects/bell-church.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if not broken then
+    	local angle = GetJointMovement(bellhinge)
+
+    	if math.abs(angle) > 20 and not hingetoggle then -- debounce 
+    		hingetoggle = true
+    		--DebugPrint("BONG")
+    		PlaySound(bellsound, GetBodyTransform(bellbody).pos, 20.0)
+    	elseif math.abs(angle) < 20 and hingetoggle then
+    		hingetoggle = false
+    	end
+    end
+end
+

```

```diff
 end
 
-function draw()
-	if not canSeePlayer then
-	 UiPush()
-      UiAlign("center middle")
-      UiTranslate(400, 200)
-      UiFont("bold.ttf", 30)
-      UiText("J = begin ragdoll agression")

-end
-end+function server.init()
+    ShoulderJoints = FindJoints("shoulder")
+    ArmJoints = FindJoints("hand1")
+    Eyes = FindBody("Head")
+    Torso = FindBody("Torso")
+    RRARM = FindBody("LLARM")
+    HipJoints = FindJoints("hip")
+    KneeJoints = FindJoints("knee")
+    walktim = 0
+    speed = 0.07
+    shootTimer = 0
+    shotDelay = 0.09
+    damage = 0.15
+    gravity = Vec(0, -40, 0)
+    velocity = 300 --tonumber(GetTagValue(barrel, "bulletspeed"))
+    maxMomentum = 6
+    ShootTimMax = 0.5
+    --GetTagValue(barrel,"gun")
+    --shoot = LoadSound("MOD/snd/".."makarov"..".ogg")
+    BulletsShot = 0
+    oldbulletsshot = 0
+    bulletsshot = 1
+    reloading = false
+    reloadtim = 0
+    maxreloadtim = 3
+    barrel = FindShape("barrel")
+    MagSize = tonumber(GetTagValue(barrel, "magsize"))
+    maxrange = tonumber(GetTagValue(barrel, "range"))/2
+    damage = tonumber(GetTagValue(barrel, "damage"))
+    firerate = tonumber(GetTagValue(barrel, "firerate"))
+    ShootTimer = math.random(1,firerate*100)/100
+    Fucked = false
+    Torso = FindBody("Torso")
+    Head = FindBody("Head")
+    canSeePlayer = false
+    if GetTagValue(barrel, "team") == "friend" then
+    	SetTag(Torso, "friend")
+    	SetTag(Head, "friendhead")
+    	team = 1
+    end
+    if GetTagValue(barrel, "team") == "enemy"then
+    	SetTag(Torso, "enemy")
+    	SetTag(Head, "enemyhead")
+    	SetTag(Torso, "shooting_target")
+    	team = 2
+    end
+    for i=1, 150 do
+    	ak47projectileHandler.shells[i] = deepcopy(ak47projectileHandler.defaultShell)
+    end
+    if HasTag(barrel, "rpg") then
+    	rpg = true
+    	gravity = Vec(0, -2, 0)
+    	velocity = 70
+    end
+    if HasTag(barrel, "stationary") then
+    	nowalk = true
+    end
+    DrawTeam = true
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        for key, shell in ipairs(ak47projectileHandler.shells) do
+        	if shell.active then
+        		ProjectileOperations(shell)
+        	end
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        	Radios = FindShapes("Spawn",true)
+        	--DebugPrint("Radios: "..#Radios)
+        	for i=1,#Radios do
+        		Radio = Radios[i]
+        		DistToRadio = VecLength(VecSub(GetShapeWorldTransform(Radio).pos, GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos))
+        		if DistToRadio < 5 then
+        			canSeePlayer = true
+        		end
+        	end
+        	if Fucked then
+        		RemoveTag(Torso, "friend")
+        		RemoveTag(Torso, "enemy")
+        		RemoveTag(Head, "friendhead")
+        		RemoveTag(Head, "enemyhead")
+        		RemoveTag(Torso, "shooting_target")
+        	end
+        	if DrawTeam then
+        	if GetTagValue(barrel, "team") == "friend" and not Fucked then
+        		TT = GetBodyTransform(Torso)
+        		DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 3, TT.pos[3]), 1,0,0)
+        	end
+        	if GetTagValue(barrel, "team") == "enemy" and not Fucked then
+        		TT = GetBodyTransform(Torso)
+        		DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 3, TT.pos[3]), 0,0,1)
+        	end
+        	if Fucked then
+        		TT = GetBodyTransform(Torso)
+        		--DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2, TT.pos[3]), 0.5,0.5,0.5)
+        	end
+        	end
+        	if HasTag(Torso, "dead") or HasTag(Torso, "panicked") then
+        		Fucked = true
+        	end
+        	-- LOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOOOLOLOLOLOLOL
+        	if team == 1 then
+        		enemies = FindBodies("enemy",true)
+        		enemieshead = FindBodies("enemyhead",true)
+        	end
+        	if team == 2 then
+        		enemies = FindBodies("friend",true)
+        		enemieshead = FindBodies("friendhead",true)
+        	end
+        	for k=1,#enemies do
+        		E = enemies[k]
+        		H = enemieshead[k]
+        		disttoenemy = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, GetBodyTransform(E).pos))
+        		if disttoenemy < 155 then
+        			enemyhead = GetBodyTransform(H)
+        			enemy = GetBodyTransform(E)
+        			for i=1,#enemies do
+        				Secondaryenemytrans = GetBodyTransform(enemies[i])
+        				disttosecondary = VecLength(VecSub(Secondaryenemytrans.pos, GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos))
+        				disttoenemy = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, enemy.pos))
+        				Player = GetPlayerTransform(playerId)
+        				disttoplayerz = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, Player.pos))
+        				if disttosecondary < disttoenemy then
+        					enemy = Secondaryenemytrans
+        					--DebugCross(enemy)
+        				end
+        				if disttoplayerz < disttosecondary and team == 1 then
+        					Player.pos[2] = Player.pos[2] + 1
+        					enemy = Player
+        					--DebugCross(enemy)
+        				end
+        				if disttoplayerz < disttoenemy and team == 1 then
+        					Player.pos[2] = Player.pos[2] + 1
+        					enemy = Player
+        					--DebugCross(enemy)
+        				end
+        			end
+        		end
+        	end
+        	if #enemies == 0 and team == 1 then
+        		Player = GetPlayerTransform(playerId)
+        		disttoplayerz = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, Player.pos))
+        		if disttoplayerz < 155 then
+        			Player.pos[2] = Player.pos[2] + 1
+        			enemy = Player
+
+        		end
+        	end
+        	--DebugPrint(canSeePlayer())
+        	if #enemies > 0 or DoPlayer then
+        	gunTrans = GetBodyTransform(Eyes)
+        	gunPos = gunTrans.pos
+        	direction = TransformToParentVec(gunTrans, Vec(0, -1, 0))
+        	shootPos = VecAdd(gunPos, VecScale(direction,0.2))
+        	disttoplayer = VecLength(VecSub(enemy.pos, gunTrans.pos))
+        	if reloading then
+        		--DebugPrint(reloadtim)
+        		reloadtim = reloadtim + dt
+        		if reloadtim > maxreloadtim then
+        			reloading = false
+        			reloadtim = 0
+        			BulletsShot = 0
+        			bulletsshot = 0
+        		end
+        	end
+        	end
+        	ShootTimer = ShootTimer + dt
+        	Player = GetPlayerTransform(playerId)
+        	disttoplayerz = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, Player.pos))
+        	if disttoplayerz < 155 and team == 1 and #enemies < 1 then
+        		DoPlayer = true
+        	else
+        		DoPlayer = false
+        	end
+        	if #enemies > 0 or DoPlayer then
+        	if not Fucked then
+        	faceplayer()
+        	end
+        	end
+        	if #enemies > 0 or DoPlayer then
+        	if canSeePlayer and not Fucked then
+        		agro = true
+        		aimweapon()
+        		runtoenemy()
+        		if disttoplayer > maxrange then
+        		run = true
+        	else
+        		run = false
+        		agro = false
+        	end
+        	end
+        	end
+        	if #enemies > 0 or DoPlayer then
+        	if canSeePlayer and ShootTimer > firerate and not reloading and not Fucked then
+        		if not run then
+        		Shoot()
+        		BulletsShot = BulletsShot + 1
+        		bulletsshot = bulletsshot + 1
+        		if BulletsShot == MagSize or bulletsshot > MagSize then
+        			reloading = true
+        		end
+        		ShootTimer = 0
+        	end
+        end
+        	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    shoot = LoadSound("MOD/snd/"..GetTagValue(barrel, "gun")..".ogg")
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("J") then
+    	canSeePlayer = true
+    end
+    if InputPressed("L") then
+    	optimizedead()
+    end
+    if InputPressed("M") then
+    	optimize()
+    end
+    if InputPressed("H") then
+    	DrawTeam = false
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    	if not canSeePlayer then
+    	 UiPush()
+          UiAlign("center middle")
+          UiTranslate(400, 200)
+          UiFont("bold.ttf", 30)
+          UiText("J = begin ragdoll agression")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("All ragdolls near a radio")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("will become agressive by themselves")
+        UiPop()
+    end
+end
+

```

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+        	DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 3, TT.pos[3]), 1,0,0)
+        end
+        if GetTagValue(barrel, "team") == "enemy" and not Fucked then
+        	TT = GetBodyTransform(Torso)
+        	DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 3, TT.pos[3]), 0,0,1)
+        end
+        if Fucked then
+        	TT = GetBodyTransform(Torso)
+        	--DrawLine(Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2.9, TT.pos[3]), Vec(TT.pos[1], TT.pos[2] + 2, TT.pos[3]), 0.5,0.5,0.5)
+        end
+        end
+        if HasTag(Torso, "dead") or HasTag(Torso, "panicked") then
+        	Fucked = true
+        end
+        -- LOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOOOLOLOLOLOLOL
+        if team == 1 then
+        	enemies = FindBodies("enemy",true)
+        	enemieshead = FindBodies("enemyhead",true)
+        end
+        if team == 2 then
+        	enemies = FindBodies("friend",true)
+        	enemieshead = FindBodies("friendhead",true)
+        end
+        for k=1,#enemies do
+        	E = enemies[k]
+        	H = enemieshead[k]
+        	disttoenemy = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, GetBodyTransform(E).pos))
+        	if disttoenemy < 155 then
+        		enemyhead = GetBodyTransform(H)
+        		enemy = GetBodyTransform(E)
+        		for i=1,#enemies do
+        			Secondaryenemytrans = GetBodyTransform(enemies[i])
+        			disttosecondary = VecLength(VecSub(Secondaryenemytrans.pos, GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos))
+        			disttoenemy = VecLength(VecSub(GetBodyTransform(Torso).pos, enemy.pos))
+        			if disttosecondary < disttoenemy then
+        				enemy = Secondaryenemytrans
+        				--DebugCross(enemy)
+        			end
+        		end
+        	end
+        end
+        --DebugPrint(canSeePlayer())
+        if #enemies ~= 0 then
+        gunTrans = GetBodyTransform(Eyes)
+        gunPos = gunTrans.pos
+        direction = TransformToParentVec(gunTrans, Vec(0, -1, 0))
+        shootPos = VecAdd(gunPos, VecScale(direction,0.2))
+        disttoplayer = VecLength(VecSub(enemy.pos, gunTrans.pos))
+        if reloading then
+        	reloadtim = reloadtim + dt
+        	if reloadtim > maxreloadtim then
+        		reloading = false
+        		reloadtim = 0
+        		BulletsShot = 0
+        	end
+        end
+        end
+        ShootTimer = ShootTimer + dt
+        if not Fucked and #enemies ~= 0 then
+        faceplayer()
+        end
+        if canSeePlayer and ShootTimer > firerate and not reloading and not Fucked and #enemies ~= 0 then
+        	if not run then
+        	Shoot()
+        	BulletsShot = BulletsShot + 1
+        	bulletsshot = bulletsshot + 1
+        	if BulletsShot == MagSize then
+        		reloading = true
+        	end
+        	ShootTimer = 0
+        end
+        end
+        if canSeePlayer and not Fucked and #enemies ~= 0 then
+        	agro = true
+        	aimweapon()
+        	runtoenemy()
+        	if disttoplayer > maxrange then
+        	run = true
+        else
+        	run = false
+        	agro = false
+        end
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    shoot = LoadSound("MOD/snd/"..GetTagValue(barrel, "gun")..".ogg")
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("J") then
+    	canSeePlayer = true
+    end
+    if InputPressed("L") then
+    	optimizedead()
+    end
+    if InputPressed("M") then
+    	optimize()
+    end
+    if InputPressed("H") then
+    	DrawTeam = false
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    	if not canSeePlayer then
+    	 UiPush()
+          UiAlign("center middle")
+          UiTranslate(400, 200)
+          UiFont("bold.ttf", 30)
+          UiText("J = begin ragdoll agression")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("All ragdolls near a radio")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("will become agressive by themselves")
+        UiPop()
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: main\Gore Ragdolls 2\scripts\gorefunctions.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
    local distance = VecLength(direction)

 function math.clamp(val, lower, upper)
     if lower > upper then lower, upper = upper, lower end -- swap if boundaries supplied the wrong way
     return math.max(lower, math.min(upper, val))
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    PlayerIsLookingAtMe = false
+    RagdollBody = {}
+    sbloodval = {};
+    bloodval = {};
+    currentbloodvalue = {};
+    Puddles = {};
+    starttotalbloodvalue = 0
+    bleed = 0
+    puddleregtim = 0
+    repuddle = 0.5
+    mergepuddledistance = 1
+    puddleneutspeed = 0.2
+    GrowSpeed = 0.003
+    Puddlemaxsize = 1
+    recoverfromtrip = 3
+    triptim = 0
+    tripped = false
+    restartjoints = false
+    trippingspeed = 4.5
+    jointstrength = 10	
+    sretractjoint = 12
+    retractjoint = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint1 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint2 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint3 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint4 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint5 = sretractjoint
+    panictim = 0
+    actualpanictim = 0
+    AAAAAAAAA = LoadLoop("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/snd/criticalcondition.ogg")
+    drowntim = 0
+    bodyparts0 = FindBodies("bodypart")
+    bodyparts = {}
+    for i = 1, #bodyparts0 do
+    	local bp = bodyparts0[i]
+    	if HasTag(bp,"Head") then
+    		bodyparts.Head = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"Torso") then
+    		bodyparts.Torso = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"RLEG") then
+    		bodyparts.RRLEG = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"RRLEG") then
+    		bodyparts.RRLEG = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"LLEG") then
+    		bodyparts.LLLEG = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"LLLEG") then
+    		bodyparts.LLLEG = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"RARM") then
+    		bodyparts.RRARM = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"RRARM") then
+    		bodyparts.RRARM = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"LARM") then
+    		bodyparts.LLARM = bp
+    	elseif HasTag(bp,"LLARM") then
+    		bodyparts.LLARM = bp
+    	end
+    end
+    jaw = FindShape("jaw")
+    totalmass = 0
+    for id,bodypart in pairs(bodyparts) do
+    	RagdollBody[bodypart] = 1
+    	bodypartstartmass = GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    	sbloodval[id] = bodypartstartmass
+    	bloodval[id] = bodypartstartmass
+    	currentbloodvalue[id] = bodypartstartmass
+    	starttotalbloodvalue = starttotalbloodvalue + GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    	totalmass = totalmass + GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    end
+    hips = FindJoints("hip")
+    knees = FindJoints("knee")
+    standTimer = 0
+    BLD_COL_R, BLD_COL_G, BLD_COL_B = .25, .05, .025
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if PlayerIsLookingAtMe and not IsPlayerLookingAtMe() then
+        	HideUiHealthOverlay()
+        end
+        PlayerIsLookingAtMe = IsPlayerLookingAtMe()
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if not tripped and not sitting then
+        	for i=1,#knees do
+        		panick()
+        		--if not IsJointBroken(hips[i]) then
+        			-- SetJointMotor(knees[i], -retractjoint3/4,jointstrength)
+        		--end
+        	end
+        end
+        if tripped then
+        	standTimer = math.clamp(standTimer-dt,0,1)
+        else
+        	standTimer = math.clamp(standTimer+dt,0,1)
+        end
+        -- Standing up
+        if not tripped and not sitting and not dead then
+        	local torsoMass = GetBodyMass(bodyparts.Torso)
+        	local trx, try, trz = GetQuatEuler(GetBodyTransform(bodyparts.Torso).rot)
+
+        	local standForce = .5*standTimer
+        	local maxSpd = .3
+        	BalanceBody(bodyparts.Torso, standForce, maxSpd)
+        	BalanceBody(bodyparts.LLEG, standForce, maxSpd)
+        	BalanceBody(bodyparts.RLEG, standForce, maxSpd)
+        	BalanceBody(bodyparts.LLLEG, standForce, maxSpd)
+        	BalanceBody(bodyparts.RRLEG, standForce, maxSpd)
+
+        	local maxJointRot = 0
+        	local applyUpForce = false
+        	for i=1,#hips do
+        		local movement = math.abs(GetJointMovement(hips[i]))
+        		if movement > 10 then
+        			applyUpForce = true
+        		end
+        		if maxJointRot < movement then
+        			maxJointRot = movement
+        		end
+        	end
+        	for i=1,#knees do
+        		local movement = math.abs(GetJointMovement(knees[i]))
+        		if movement > 10 then
+        			applyUpForce = true
+        		end
+        		if maxJointRot < movement then
+        			maxJointRot = movement
+        		end
+        	end
+        	if applyUpForce then
+        		ApplyBodyImpulse(bodyparts.Torso,GetBodyTransform(bodyparts.Torso).pos,Vec(0,.7*(maxJointRot/90)^.5*torsoMass,0))
+        	end
+        end
+        if not dead then
+        	evtelse = FindShapes("")
+        	SetShapeCollisionFilter(jaw, 2, 255-2)
+        	torsos = GetBodyShapes(bodyparts.Torso)
+        	for i=1,#torsos do
+        	SetShapeCollisionFilter(torsos[i], 2, 255-2)
+        	end
+        	jawjoints = GetShapeJoints(jaw)
+        	for i=1,#jawjoints do
+        		SetJointMotor(jawjoints[i], 0.5)
+        	end
+        else
+        	jawjoints = GetShapeJoints(jaw)
+        	for i=1,#jawjoints do
+        		SetJointMotor(jawjoints[i], 0, 0)
+        	end
+        end
+        if panic then
+        	panictim = panictim + dt
+        	actualpanictim = actualpanictim + dt
+        end
+        totalbloodvalue = 0
+        if tripped then
+        	cower()
+        	triptim = triptim + dt
+        	if triptim > recoverfromtrip and VecLength(GetBodyVelocity(FindBody("Torso"))) < trippingspeed then
+        		tripped = false
+        		triptim = 0
+        	end
+        end
+        	if id == "Head" then
+        		if IsPointInWater(bodyparttransform.pos) then
+        			tripped = true
+        			drowntim = drowntim + dt
+        		end
+        	end
+        	if drowntim > 5 then
+        		dead = true
+        	end
+        	if IsBodyBroken(bodypart) then
+
+        		if id == "Head" then
+        			dead = true
+        		end
+
+        		if bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/10 then
+        			panic = true
+        			tripped = true
+        		end
+        	end
+        	if IsBodyBroken(bodypart) and currentbloodvalue[id] > 0 then
+        		if bodyState.overall == "healthy" then bodyState.overall = "injured" end
+
+        		if id == "LLLEG" or id == "LLEG" then
+        			bodyState.leftLeg = BROKEN_BODY_PART			
+        			if not diddit1 and bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/3 then
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				diddit1 = true
+        			end
+        		elseif id == "RRLEG" or id == "RLEG" then
+        			bodyState.rightLeg = BROKEN_BODY_PART					
+        			if not diddit2 and bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/3 then
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				diddit2 = true
+        			end
+        		elseif id == "RRARM" or id == "RARM" then
+        			bodyState.rightArm = BROKEN_BODY_PART
+        			if not diddit3 and bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/3 then
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				diddit3 = true
+        			end				
+        		elseif id == "LLARM" or id == "LARM" then
+        			bodyState.leftArm = BROKEN_BODY_PART
+        			if not diddit4 and bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/3 then
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				diddit4 = true
+        			end							
+        		end
+
+        		--Paint(GetAimPos(), bleedintensity/sbloodval[i], "explosion")
+
+        		puddleregtim = puddleregtim + dt
+
+        		PuddleHandleing()
+        		if puddleregtim > repuddle then
+        		--for i=1,bleedintensity/10 do
+        		--DebugPrint(bleedintensity)
+        		InsertPuddleToTable()
+        		bleedparticles()
+        		PaintRGBA(GetAimPos(), bleedintensity/sbloodval[id], BLD_COL_R, BLD_COL_G, BLD_COL_B, .6+math.random()*.4, .5+math.random()*.5)
+        		--end
+        		puddleregtim = 0
+        		end
+        		bleedparticles()
+
+        		if bloodval[id] < 0.5 then ---------------------------------------------------------------
+        		bleedintensity = 1000
+        			for i=1,12 do
+        				InsertPuddleToTable()
+        			end
+        			currentbloodvalue[id] = 0
+        		end
+
+        		if HasTag(bodypart, "Torso") and bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id]/1.2 then			
+        			--DebugPrint("SUPPOSED TO BE LOL GUTTED XD")
+        			if not entrailed then
+        				bodyState.body = BROKEN_BODY_PART
+        				bodyState.overall = "dead"
+        				dead = true
+        				entrailed = true
+        				for i=1,4 do
+        					InsertPuddleToTable()
+        				end
+
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/entrails.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Heart.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Spine.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				for i=1,2 do
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Lung.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				end
+        				for i=1,30 do
+        					Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/BrainMatter.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				end
+        				--DebugPrint("LOL GUTTED XD")
+        			end
+        		end
+
+        		if id == "Head" then
+        			bodyState.head = BROKEN_BODY_PART	
+        			bodyState.overall = "dead"	
+        			eyej = FindJoints("eye")
+        			if bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/4 then
+        			for i=1,#eyej do
+        				Delete(eyej[i])
+        			end
+        			end
+        			if bloodval[id] < sbloodval[id] - sbloodval[id]/3 then
+        			if not fragged then
+        				fragged = true
+        				for i=1,4 do
+        					InsertPuddleToTable()
+        				end
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Jaw.xml.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				for i=1,2 do
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Eye_Socket.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Fragment.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				end
+        				for i=1,10 do
+        					Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/BrainMatter.xml", bodyparttransform)
+        				end
+        				--DebugPrint("LOL GUTTED XD")
+        			end
+        			end
+        		end
+        	end
+        end
+        if IsJointBroken(FindJoint("neck")) or totalbloodvalue < starttotalbloodvalue - starttotalbloodvalue/1.5 then
+        	bodyState.head = BROKEN_NECK						
+        	bodyState.overall = "dead"	
+        	dead = true
+        end
+        if restartjoints and not tripped then
+        	restartjointsfunc()
+        end
+        if dead then
+        	restartjointsfunc()
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if PlayerIsLookingAtMe then 
+    	if InputPressed("h") then 
+    		ToggleUiHealthOverlay()		
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("x") then
+    		ToggleUiHealthDetailsOverlay()
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for id,bodypart in pairs(bodyparts) do
+    	bodypartcurrentmass = GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    	bloodval[id] = bodypartcurrentmass
+    	bodyparttransform = GetBodyTransform(bodypart)
+    	--DebugPrint(bloodval[i])
+    	bleedintensity = ((bloodval[id]/sbloodval[id]) - 1) * -10
+    	--DebugPrint(currentbloodvalue[i])
+    	currentbloodvalue[id] = currentbloodvalue[id] - bleedintensity/75
+    	totalbloodvalue = totalbloodvalue + currentbloodvalue[id]
+    	if HasTag(bodypart, "Torso") then
+    		torsovelocity = VecLength(GetBodyVelocity(bodypart))
+    		if torsovelocity > trippingspeed then
+    			tripped = true
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if sitting then
+    		sit()
+    	end
+
+    	if id == "Torso" then
+    			bodypartpos = GetBodyTransform(bodypart)
+    			disttobodypart = VecLength(VecSub(GetAimPossit(), bodypartpos.pos))
+    			cycled = true
+    			--[[if InputPressed("P") and cycled and not sitting then
+    			if disttobodypart < 3 then
+    				sitting = true
+    				cycled = false
+    			end
+    			end
+
+    			if InputPressed("P") and cycled and sitting then
+    			if disttobodypart < 3 then
+    				sitting = false
+    				cycled = false
+    				restartjointsfunc()
+    			end
+    			end]]
+    	end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    DrawUiHealthOverlay(dt)
+end
+

```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+function server.init()
+    local turnoff = FindShapes("fxturnoff", true)
+    for i=1, #turnoff do
+    	SetShapeEmissiveScale(turnoff[i], 0.0)
+    end
+    local shapes = FindShapes("fxbreak", true)
+    for i=1, #shapes do
+    	local v = GetTagValue(shapes[i], "fxbreak")
+    	local b = {}
+    	b.shape = shapes[i]
+    	b.broken = false
+    	b.voxelCount = GetShapeVoxelCount(b.shape)
+    	b.point = Vec()
+    	b.normal = Vec()
+    	b.age = 0
+    	b.radius = 0
+    	b.lifeTime = tonumber(string.sub(v, 2, 2))
+    	b.color = string.sub(v, 3, string.len(v))
+    	b.type = string.sub(v, 1, 1)
+    	if b.lifeTime and b.lifeTime ~= 0 then
+    		breakables[#breakables+1] = b		
+    	end
+    end
+    snd = {}
+    local locations = FindLocations("fxsmoke", true)
+    for i=1, #locations do
+    	local l = locations[i]
+    	local v = GetTagValue(l, "fxsmoke")
+    	local s = {}
+    	local t = GetLocationTransform(l)
+    	local hit,point,normal,shape = QueryClosestPoint(t.pos, 0.5)
+    	if hit then
+    		s.shape = shape
+    		s.enabled = true
+    		local st = GetShapeWorldTransform(shape)
+    		s.point = TransformToLocalPoint(st, t.pos)
+    		s.normal = TransformToLocalVec(st, TransformToParentVec(t, Vec(0,0,-1)))
+    		s.spawn = 0
+    		s.color = string.sub(v, 3, string.len(v))
+    		s.type = string.sub(v, 1, 1)
+    		s.scale = tonumber(string.sub(v, 2, 2))
+    		s.timeOffset = rnd(0, 10)
+    		if not s.scale then
+    			s.scale = 1
+    		end
+    		smokes[#smokes+1] = s
+    	end
+    end
+    local lights = FindLights("fxflicker", true)
+    for i=1, #lights do
+    	local l = lights[i]
+    	local shape = GetLightShape(l)
+    	if IsLightActive(l) then
+    		local v = GetTagValue(l, "fxflicker")
+    		local f = {}
+    		f.enabled = true
+    		f.light = l
+    		f.shape = shape
+    		f.timer = 0
+    		f.scale = 1
+    		f.period = tonumber(string.sub(v, 1, 1))
+    		if not f.period then
+    			f.period = 1
+    		end
+    		flickers[#flickers+1] = f
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        local hasBreakage = GetBool("game.break")
+        local breakPoint = Vec(GetFloat("game.break.x"), GetFloat("game.break.y"), GetFloat("game.break.z"))
+        for i=1, #smokes do
+        	local s = smokes[i]
+        	if s.enabled then
+        		if IsShapeBroken(s.shape) then
+        			s.enabled = false
+        		end
+        	end
+        end
+        for i=1, #flickers do
+        	local f = flickers[i]
+        	if f.enabled then
+        		if IsShapeBroken(f.shape) then
+        			f.enabled = false
+        		else
+        			f.timer = f.timer - dt
+        			if f.timer < 0 then
+        				if f.scale == 1 then
+        					f.scale = rnd(0.2, 0.5)
+        					SetShapeEmissiveScale(f.shape, f.scale)
+        					f.timer = rnd(0.0, f.period*0.3)
+        				else
+        					f.scale = 1
+        					SetShapeEmissiveScale(f.shape, f.scale)
+        					f.timer = rnd(0.0, f.period)
+        				end
+        			end
+        		end
+        	end
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        for i=1, #breakables do
+        	local b = breakables[i]
+        	if b.broken and b.age < b.lifeTime then
+        		b.age = math.min(b.age + dt, b.lifeTime)
+        		effect(b)
+        	end
+        end
+        for i=1, #smokes do
+        	local s = smokes[i]
+        	if s.enabled then
+        		emitSmoke(s)
+        	end
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    snd["l"] = { LoadSound("liquid-s0.ogg"), LoadSound("liquid-m0.ogg"), LoadSound("liquid-m0.ogg")}
+    snd["g"] = { LoadSound("gas-s0.ogg"), LoadSound("gas-m0.ogg"), LoadSound("gas-l0.ogg")}
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1, #breakables do
+    	local b = breakables[i]
+    	if not b.broken then
+    		if IsShapeBroken(b.shape) then
+    			b.age = b.lifeTime
+    			b.broken = true
+    			if HasTag(b.shape, "fxbreak") and hasBreakage then
+    				disableJointed(b.shape)
+    				cancelAllBreakables()
+    				local t = GetShapeWorldTransform(b.shape)
+    				local h,cp,cn = GetShapeClosestPoint(b.shape, breakPoint)
+    				if h and VecLength(VecSub(cp, breakPoint)) < 1.0 then
+    					local mi, ma = GetShapeBounds(b.shape)
+    					if b.type == "l" then
+    						local center = VecLerp(mi, ma, 0.5)
+    						center[2] = math.max(breakPoint[2], center[2])
+    						b.normal = TransformToLocalVec(t, VecNormalize(VecSub(breakPoint, center)))
+    					else
+    						b.normal = TransformToLocalVec(t, VecNormalize(VecSub(breakPoint, cp)))
+    					end
+    					b.point = TransformToLocalPoint(t, VecAdd(cp, VecScale(cn, 0.2)))
+    					b.radius = clamp(VecLength(VecSub(breakPoint, cp))*0.8-0.1, 0.1, 0.25)
+    					b.age = 0
+    					if snd[b.type] then
+    						if b.lifeTime < 1.5 then
+    							PlaySound(snd[b.type][1], breakPoint)
+    						elseif b.lifeTime < 2.5 then
+    							PlaySound(snd[b.type][2], breakPoint)
+    						else
+    							PlaySound(snd[b.type][3], breakPoint)
+    						end
+    					end
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+end
+

```

# Migration Report: main\Gore Ragdolls 2\scripts\gorelaunch.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    force = 5
 end
 
-function tick()

-		body = FindBody("gore")

-		imp = Vec(math.random(-force,force),math.random(force/3,force),math.random(-force,force))

-end+function server.tick(dt)

+        	imp = Vec(math.random(-force,force),math.random(force/3,force),math.random(-force,force))
+        	SetBodyVelocity(body, imp)
+        	imp = Vec(math.random(-force,force),math.random(force/3,force),math.random(-force,force))

+        end
+    end
+end
```
