```diff
-	function GetAimPossit()
-   local ct = GetPlayerCameraTransform()
+function GetAimPossit()
+   local ct = GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId)
    local forwardPos = TransformToParentPoint(ct, Vec(0, 0, -200))
    local direction = VecSub(forwardPos, ct.pos)
    local distance = VecLength(direction)
@@ -593,4 +232,369 @@
 	--SetJointMotor(hand2, retractjoint5,jointstrength)
 	end
 	end
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    PlayerIsLookingAtMe = false
+    RagdollBody = {}
+    sbloodval = {};
+    bloodval = {};
+    currentbloodvalue = {};
+    Puddles = {};
+    bodyparts = FindBodies("bodypart")
+    starttotalbloodvalue = 0
+    for i=1,#bodyparts do		
+    	bodypart = bodyparts[i]
+    	RagdollBody[bodypart] = 1
+    	bodypartstartmass = GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    	table.insert(sbloodval, bodypartstartmass)
+    	table.insert(bloodval, bodypartstartmass)
+    	table.insert(currentbloodvalue, bodypartstartmass)
+    	--table.insert(puddles, {pos={x,y,z}, amount=3.0})
+    	starttotalbloodvalue = starttotalbloodvalue + GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    end
+    bleed = 0
+    puddleregtim = 0
+    repuddle = 0.5
+    mergepuddledistance = 1
+    puddleneutspeed = 0.2
+    GrowSpeed = 0.003
+    Puddlemaxsize = 1
+    upspeed = 50
+    headvel = Vec(0,GetBodyMass(FindBody("RRLEG"))/upspeed,0)
+    --DebugPrint("HeadMass: "..headvel)
+    legvel = Vec(0,-GetBodyMass(FindBody("LLLEG"))/20,0)
+    recoverfromtrip = 3
+    triptim = 0
+    tripped = false
+    restartjoints = false
+    trippingspeed = 15
+    jointstrength = 10	
+    sretractjoint = 12
+    retractjoint = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint1 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint2 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint3 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint4 = sretractjoint
+    retractjoint5 = sretractjoint
+    panictim = 0
+    actualpanictim = 0
+    drowntim = 0
+    togglecontrol = false
+    ptrans = GetPlayerTransform(playerId)
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if PlayerIsLookingAtMe and not IsPlayerLookingAtMe() then
+        	HideUiHealthOverlay()
+        end
+        PlayerIsLookingAtMe = IsPlayerLookingAtMe()
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if not tripped and not sitting then
+        	knees = FindJoints("knee")
+        	for i=1,#knees do
+        		panick()
+        		--if not IsJointBroken(hips[i]) then
+        			SetJointMotor(knees[i], -retractjoint3/4,jointstrength)
+        		--end
+        	end
+        end
+        jaw = FindShape("jaw")
+        if not dead then
+        	jaw = FindShape("jaw")
+        	evtelse = FindShapes("")
+        	SetShapeCollisionFilter(jaw, 2, 255-2)
+        	torsos = GetBodyShapes(FindBody("Torso"))
+        	for i=1,#torsos do
+        	SetShapeCollisionFilter(torsos[i], 2, 255-2)
+        	end
+        	jawjoints = GetShapeJoints(jaw)
+        	for i=1,#jawjoints do
+        		SetJointMotor(jawjoints[i], 0.5)
+        	end
+        else
+        	jawjoints = GetShapeJoints(jaw)
+        	for i=1,#jawjoints do
+        		SetJointMotor(jawjoints[i], 0, 0)
+        	end
+        end
+        if panic then
+        	panictim = panictim + dt
+        	actualpanictim = actualpanictim + dt
+        end
+        bodyparts = FindBodies("bodypart")
+        totalbloodvalue = 0
+        if tripped then
+        	cower()
+        	triptim = triptim + dt
+        	if triptim > recoverfromtrip and VecLength(GetBodyVelocity(FindBody("Torso"))) < trippingspeed then
+        		tripped = false
+        		triptim = 0
+        	end
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    AAAAAAAAA = LoadSound("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/snd/AAA.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if PlayerIsLookingAtMe then 
+    	if InputPressed("h") then 
+    		ToggleUiHealthOverlay()		
+    	end
+    	if InputPressed("x") then
+    		ToggleUiHealthDetailsOverlay()
+    	end
+    end
+    if InputPressed("x") then togglecontrol = not togglecontrol if togglecontrol then ptrans = GetPlayerTransform(playerId) end end
+
+    if togglecontrol then
+    	SetPlayerTransform(playerId, ptrans)
+
+    	torso = FindBody("Torso")
+    	torsotrans = GetBodyTransform(torso)
+    	head = FindBody("Head")
+    	headtrans = GetBodyTransform(head)
+    	local pos = TransformToParentPoint(headtrans, Vec(0.025, 0.025, 0.1))
+    	local rot = QuatRotateQuat(headtrans.rot, QuatEuler(0, 180, 0))
+    	SetCameraTransform(Transform(pos,rot), 120)
+
+    	if not dead then
+    		SetBodyAngularVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyAngularVelocity(), Vec(0,-InputValue("mousedx")*0.25,0)))
+    		if InputDown("up") then SetBodyVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(), TransformToParentVec(torsotrans, Vec(0,2,-5)))) end
+    		if InputDown("down") then SetBodyVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(), TransformToParentVec(torsotrans, Vec(0,2,5)))) end
+    		if InputDown("left") then SetBodyVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(), TransformToParentVec(torsotrans, Vec(-5,2,0)))) end
+    		if InputDown("right") then SetBodyVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(), TransformToParentVec(torsotrans, Vec(5,2,0)))) end
+    		if InputDown("jump") then SetBodyVelocity(torso, VecAdd(GetBodyVelocity(), TransformToParentVec(torsotrans, Vec(0,5,0)))) end
+    	end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1,#bodyparts do
+    	bodypart = bodyparts[i]
+    	bodypartcurrentmass = GetBodyMass(bodypart)
+    	bloodval[i] = bodypartcurrentmass
+    	bodyparttransform = GetBodyTransform(bodypart)
+    	--DebugPrint(bloodval[i])
+    	bleedintensity = ((bloodval[i]/sbloodval[i]) - 1) * -10
+    	--DebugPrint(currentbloodvalue[i])
+    	currentbloodvalue[i] = currentbloodvalue[i] - bleedintensity/75
+    	totalbloodvalue = totalbloodvalue + currentbloodvalue[i]
+    	if HasTag(bodypart, "Torso") then
+    		torsovelocity = VecLength(GetBodyVelocity(bodypart))
+    		if torsovelocity > trippingspeed then
+    			tripped = true
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if sitting then
+    		sit()
+    	end
+
+    	if HasTag(bodypart,"Torso") then
+    			bodypartpos = GetBodyTransform(bodypart)
+    			disttobodypart = VecLength(VecSub(GetAimPossit(), bodypartpos.pos))
+    			cycled = true
+    			if InputPressed("P") and cycled and not sitting then
+    			if disttobodypart < 3 then
+    				sitting = true
+    				cycled = false
+    			end
+    			end
+
+    			if InputPressed("P") and cycled and sitting then
+    			if disttobodypart < 3 then
+    				sitting = false
+    				cycled = false
+    				restartjointsfunc()
+    			end
+    			end
+    	end
+
+    	if HasTag(bodypart, "Head") then
+    		if IsPointInWater(bodyparttransform.pos) then
+    			tripped = true
+    			drowntim = drowntim + dt
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if drowntim > 5 then
+    		dead = true
+    	end
+
+    	if not tripped and HasTag(bodypart, "Head") and not dead and not sitting then
+    			--Paint(GetAimPos(), (bleedintensity/sbloodval[i])*1.3, "explosion")
+    			currentvel = GetBodyVelocity(bodypart)
+    			SetBodyVelocity(bodypart, VecAdd(currentvel, headvel))
+    			--DebugPrint(VecAdd(currentvel, headvel)[2])
+    			if IsBodyBroken(bodypart) then
+    				bodyState.head = BROKEN_BODY_PART	
+    				bodyState.overall = "dead"					
+    				dead = true
+    				if bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i] / 4 then
+    				bods = GetBodyShapes(bodypart)
+    				for i = 1,#bods do
+    					j = GetShapeJoints(bods[i])
+    					for z = 1,#j do
+    						Delete(j[i])
+    					end
+    				end
+    			end
+    			end
+    	end
+
+    	if not tripped and HasTag(bodypart, "RRLEG") or HasTag(bodypart, "LLLEG") then
+    		if not dead and not sitting then
+    			--Paint(GetAimPos(), (bleedintensity/sbloodval[i])*1.3, "explosion")
+    			currentvel = GetBodyVelocity(bodypart)
+    			SetBodyVelocity(bodypart, VecAdd(currentvel, legvel))
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if IsBodyBroken(bodypart) then
+
+    		if HasTag(bodypart, "Head") then
+    			dead = true
+    		end
+
+    		if bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/2 then
+    			panic = true
+    			tripped = true
+    		end
+    	end
+
+    	if IsBodyBroken(bodypart) and currentbloodvalue[i] > 0 then
+    		if bodyState.overall == "healthy" then bodyState.overall = "injured" end
+
+    		if HasTag(bodypart, "LLLEG") or HasTag(bodypart, "LLEG") then
+    			bodyState.leftLeg = BROKEN_BODY_PART			
+    			if not diddit1 and bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/3 then
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				diddit1 = true
+    			end
+    		elseif HasTag(bodypart, "RRLEG") or HasTag(bodypart, "RLEG") then
+    			bodyState.rightLeg = BROKEN_BODY_PART					
+    			if not diddit2 and bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/3 then
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				diddit2 = true
+    			end
+    		elseif HasTag(bodypart, "RRARM") or HasTag(bodypart, "RARM") then
+    			bodyState.rightArm = BROKEN_BODY_PART	
+    			if not diddit3 and bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/3 then
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				diddit3 = true
+    			end				
+    		elseif HasTag(bodypart, "LLARM") or HasTag(bodypart, "LARM") then
+    			bodyState.leftArm = BROKEN_BODY_PART	
+    			if not diddit4 and bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/3 then
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/boner.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				diddit4 = true
+    			end							
+    		end
+
+    		--Paint(GetAimPos(), bleedintensity/sbloodval[i], "explosion")
+
+    		puddleregtim = puddleregtim + dt
+
+    		PuddleHandleing()
+    		if puddleregtim > repuddle then
+    		--for i=1,bleedintensity/10 do
+    		--DebugPrint(bleedintensity)
+    		InsertPuddleToTable()
+    		bleedparticles()
+    		Paint(GetAimPos(), bleedintensity/sbloodval[i], "explosion")
+    		--end
+    		puddleregtim = 0
+    		end
+    		bleedparticles()
+
+    		if bloodval[i] < 0.5 then ---------------------------------------------------------------
+    		bleedintensity = 1000
+    			for i=1,12 do
+    				InsertPuddleToTable()
+    			end
+    			currentbloodvalue[i] = 0
+    		end
+
+    		if HasTag(bodypart, "Torso") and bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i]/1.2 then			
+    			--DebugPrint("SUPPOSED TO BE LOL GUTTED XD")
+    			if not entrailed then
+    				bodyState.body = BROKEN_BODY_PART
+    				bodyState.overall = "dead"
+    				dead = true
+    				entrailed = true
+    				for i=1,4 do
+    					InsertPuddleToTable()
+    				end
+
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/entrails.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Heart.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Spine.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				for i=1,2 do
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Lung.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				end
+    				for i=1,30 do
+    					Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/BrainMatter.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				end
+    				--DebugPrint("LOL GUTTED XD")
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    		if HasTag(bodypart, "Head") then
+    			bodyState.head = BROKEN_BODY_PART	
+    			bodyState.overall = "dead"	
+    			eyej = FindJoints("eye")
+    			if bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/4 then
+    			for i=1,#eyej do
+    				Delete(eyej[i])
+    			end
+    			end
+    			if bloodval[i] < sbloodval[i] - sbloodval[i]/3 then
+    			if not fragged then
+    				fragged = true
+    				for i=1,4 do
+    					InsertPuddleToTable()
+    				end
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Jaw.xml.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				for i=1,2 do
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Eye_Socket.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/Skull_Fragment.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				end
+    				for i=1,10 do
+    					Spawn("MOD/main/Gore Ragdolls 2/internals/BrainMatter.xml", bodyparttransform)
+    				end
+    				--DebugPrint("LOL GUTTED XD")
+    			end
+    			end
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+    if IsJointBroken(FindJoint("neck")) or totalbloodvalue < starttotalbloodvalue - starttotalbloodvalue/1.5 then
+    	bodyState.head = BROKEN_NECK						
+    	bodyState.overall = "dead"	
+    	dead = true
+    end
+
+    if restartjoints and not tripped then
+    	restartjointsfunc()
+    end
+
+    if dead then
+    	restartjointsfunc()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    DrawUiHealthOverlay(dt)
+end
+

```

```diff
+        	end
+        end
+        end
+        cycled = false
+    end
 end
-end+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("j") and not start and not cycled then
+    	start = true
+    	cycled = true
+    end
+    if InputPressed("j") and start and not cycled then
+    	start = false
+    	cycled = true
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()

+          UiAlign("center middle")

+          UiFont("bold.ttf", 30)
+          UiText("J = Start/Disable spawning")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("L = Delete dead")
+          UiTranslate(0, 50)
+          UiText("M = Delete everyone")
+        UiPop()
+    end
+end
```

```diff
-	end
-
-	for i=1,#up do
-		if GetPlayerInteractShape() == up[i] and InputPressed("interact") and not downPressed then
-			downTimer = 0
-			upTimer = pTimer
-			if not upPressed then
-				upPressed = true
-				press(up[i])
-				currentClicked = up[i]
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	
-	if downTimer <= 0 then
-		downTimer = 0
-		if downPressed then
-			unpress(currentClicked)
-		end
-		downPressed = false
-	end
-	if upTimer <= 0 then
-		upTimer = 0
-		if upPressed then
-			unpress(currentClicked)
-		end
-		upPressed = false
-	end
-
-	local eps = 0.01
-	if motorTimer > 0 then
-		if downPressed and motorTimer > 0.1 then
-			SetJointMotor(motor, pSpeed)
-			PlayLoop(motorSound,motorPos)
-			if GetJointMovement(motor) < limitMin+eps then
-				downTimer = 0.0			
-			end
-		elseif upPressed and motorTimer > 0.1 then
-			SetJointMotor(motor, -pSpeed)
-			PlayLoop(motorSound,motorPos)
-			if GetJointMovement(motor) > limitMax-eps then
-				upTimer = 0.0			
-			end
-		else
-			SetJointMotor(motor, 0.0)
-			motorTimer = 0.0
-		end
-		motorTimer = motorTimer - dt
-	end
+function server.init()
+    motor = FindJoint("motor")
+    limitMin, limitMax = GetJointLimits(motor)
+    down = FindShapes("down",false)
+    up = FindShapes("up",false)
+    motorSound = LoadLoop("vehicle/hydraulic-loop.ogg")
+    doorbase = FindBody("doorbase")
+    for i=1,#down do
+    	SetTag(down[i], "interact", "loc@DOWN")
+    	SetShapeEmissiveScale(down[i], 0)
+    end
+    for i=1,#up do
+    	SetTag(up[i], "interact", "loc@UP")
+    	SetShapeEmissiveScale(up[i], 0)
+    end
+    downPressed = false
+    downTimer = 0
+    upPressed = false
+    upTimer = 0
+    currentClicked = null
+    motorTimer = 0.1
 end
 
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        downTimer = downTimer - dt
+        upTimer = upTimer - dt
+        local motorPos = GetBodyTransform(doorbase).pos
+        if downTimer <= 0 then
+        	downTimer = 0
+        	if downPressed then
+        		unpress(currentClicked)
+        	end
+        	downPressed = false
+        end
+        if upTimer <= 0 then
+        	upTimer = 0
+        	if upPressed then
+        		unpress(currentClicked)
+        	end
+        	upPressed = false
+        end
+        local eps = 0.01
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    clickUp = LoadSound("clickup.ogg")
+    clickDown = LoadSound("clickdown.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1,#down do
+    	if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == down[i] and InputPressed("interact") and not upPressed then
+    		upTimer = 0
+    		downTimer = pTimer
+    		if not downPressed then
+    			downPressed = true
+    			press(down[i])
+    			currentClicked = down[i]
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+    for i=1,#up do
+    	if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == up[i] and InputPressed("interact") and not downPressed then
+    		downTimer = 0
+    		upTimer = pTimer
+    		if not upPressed then
+    			upPressed = true
+    			press(up[i])
+    			currentClicked = up[i]
+    		end
+    	end
+    end
+    if motorTimer ~= 0 then
+    	if downPressed and motorTimer > 0.1 then
+    		SetJointMotor(motor, pSpeed)
+    		PlayLoop(motorSound,motorPos)
+    		if GetJointMovement(motor) < limitMin+eps then
+    			downTimer = 0.0			
+    		end
+    	elseif upPressed and motorTimer > 0.1 then
+    		SetJointMotor(motor, -pSpeed)
+    		PlayLoop(motorSound,motorPos)
+    		if GetJointMovement(motor) > limitMax-eps then
+    			upTimer = 0.0			
+    		end
+    	else
+    		SetJointMotor(motor, 0.0)
+    		motorTimer = 0.0
+    	end
+    	motorTimer = motorTimer - dt
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: main\snd\music.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/main\snd\music.lua
+++ patched/main\snd\music.lua
@@ -1,17 +1,20 @@
-function init()
-	CD = FindBody("CD")
-	songName = GetTagValue(CD,"CD")
-	songPath = "MOD/main/snd/"..songName..".ogg"
-	songLoop = LoadLoop(songPath)
-	playing = false
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    CD = FindBody("CD")
+    songName = GetTagValue(CD,"CD")
+    songPath = "MOD/main/snd/"..songName..".ogg"
+    songLoop = LoadLoop(songPath)
+    playing = false
 end
 
-function tick(dt)
-	if InputPressed("interact") and GetPlayerInteractBody() == CD then
-		playing = not playing
-		if playing then SetTag(CD,"interact","Stop") else SetTag(CD,"interact","Play") end
-	end
-	if playing then
-		PlayLoop(songLoop, GetBodyTransform(CD).pos, .3)
-	end
-end+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if InputPressed("interact") and GetPlayerInteractBody(playerId) == CD then
+    	playing = not playing
+    	if playing then SetTag(CD,"interact","Stop") else SetTag(CD,"interact","Play") end
+    end
+    if playing then
+    	PlayLoop(songLoop, GetBodyTransform(CD).pos, .3)
+    end
+end
+

```

---

# Migration Report: main\terrain\movingtarget.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/main\terrain\movingtarget.lua
+++ patched/main\terrain\movingtarget.lua
@@ -1,29 +1,29 @@
-function init()
-	target = FindJoints("rail")
-	min, max = GetJointLimits(target[1])
-	current = GetJointMovement(target[1])
-	i = 1
-	t = 0
-	
-	-- set initial motor speeds
-	for i = 1, #target do
-		SetJointMotor(target[i], -6)
-	end
-end
-
-function tick(dt)
-    -- update motor speed for current joint
-    if GetJointMovement(target[i]) <= min then 
-        SetJointMotor(target[i], -6) 
-    elseif GetJointMovement(target[i]) >= max then
-        SetJointMotor(target[i], 6) 
-    end
-    -- DebugWatch("Joint Velocity", GetJointMovement(target[i]))
-    -- increment joint index
-    i = i + 1
-    if i > #target then
-        i = 1
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    target = FindJoints("rail")
+    min, max = GetJointLimits(target[1])
+    current = GetJointMovement(target[1])
+    i = 1
+    t = 0
+    -- set initial motor speeds
+    for i = 1, #target do
+    	SetJointMotor(target[i], -6)
     end
 end
 
--- Chatgpt wrote this code, fixed by OffensivePDF+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if GetJointMovement(target[i]) <= min then 
+            SetJointMotor(target[i], -6) 
+        elseif GetJointMovement(target[i]) >= max then
+            SetJointMotor(target[i], 6) 
+        end
+        -- DebugWatch("Joint Velocity", GetJointMovement(target[i]))
+        -- increment joint index
+        i = i + 1
+        if i > #target then
+            i = 1
+        end
+    end
+end
+

```

```diff
 function clamp(a, mi, ma)
 	if a < mi then return mi
 	elseif a > ma then return ma
@@ -5,69 +6,16 @@
 	end
 end
 
-pRandom = GetInt("random", 1)
-pSize = clamp(GetFloat("size", 1), 0.1, 3)
```

```diff
+#version 2
 function randomFloat(min,max)
 	min=tonumber(min)or 0
 	max=tonumber(max)or 1
 	return math.random()*(max-min)+min
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+    Width = 8
+    Height = 6
+    PlayerDistance = 0
+    LastMilestone = 0
+    PlaySpace = {}
+    for h=1,Height do
+    	PlaySpace[h] = {}
+    	for w=1,Width do
+    		PlaySpace[h][w] = {
+    			['Spawned'] = false,
+    			['Color'] = {'none'},
+    		}
+    	end
+    end
+    RequestSpawn = {}
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        local newDistance = GetPlayerTransform(playerId).pos[3]
+           if math.floor(newDistance / 20) > math.floor(LastMilestone / 20) then
+               Height = Height + 1
+        	PlaySpace[Height] = {}
+        	for w=1,Width do
+        		PlaySpace[Height][w] = {
+        			['Spawned'] = false,
+        			['Color'] = {'none'}
+        		}
+        	end
+               LastMilestone = newDistance
+           end
+        DebugWatch('Distance', newDistance)
+           PlayerDistance = newDistance
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        if #RequestSpawn ~= 0 then
+        	Spawn(RequestSpawn[1].xml, RequestSpawn[1].transform,true)
+        	if math.random() <= 0.15 then
+        		Spawn("MOD/characters/prefabs/NPC/Alashyan_Soldier.xml",Transform(VecAdd(RequestSpawn[1].transform.pos,Vec(0,1,0))))
+        	end
+
+        	table.remove(RequestSpawn,1)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    UiPush()
+    	if #PlaySpace >= 5 then
+    		UiTranslate(0,-(PlayerDistance/20*55)+100)
+    	end
+    	local y = 50
+    	for h=1,#PlaySpace do
+    		local x = 50
+    		for w=#PlaySpace[h],1,-1 do
+    			local Piece = WidthPiece[w]
+    			if PlaySpace[h][w].Color[1] == 'none' then
+    				if Piece == 'Road' then
+    					PlaySpace[h][w].Color = {0,0,1+randomFloat(-0.1,0.1)}
+    				else
+    					PlaySpace[h][w].Color = {randomFloat(-1,1),randomFloat(-1,1),randomFloat(-1,1)}
+    				end
+    			end
+    			local WidthColor = PlaySpace[h][w].Color
+
+    			UiPush()
+    				UiColor(WidthColor[1], WidthColor[2], WidthColor[3])
+    				UiTranslate(UiCenter()/5+x, 0+y)
+    				UiAlign("top left")
+    				UiRect(50, 50)
+    				x = x + 55
+    			UiPop()
+    			DebugCross(Vec(200*x,1,200*y))
+    			if not PlaySpace[h][w].Spawned then
+    				DebugPrint('Spawning')
+    				local XML = '<voxbox size="200 1 200" material="metal" color="'..WidthColor[1]..' '..WidthColor[2]..' '..WidthColor[3]..'"></voxbox>'
+    				if XMLChunkTypes[Piece] then
+    					XML = XMLChunkTypes[Piece][math.random(1,#XMLChunkTypes[Piece])]
+    				end
+    				table.insert(RequestSpawn,{xml=XML,transform=Transform(Vec(-120+20*w,0,20*h))})
+
+    				PlaySpace[h][w].Spawned = true
+    			end
+    		end
+    		y = y + 55
+    	end
+    	local Animators = FindAnimators('',true)
+    	for i=1,#Animators do
+    		if Animators[i] ~= GetPlayerAnimator() then
+    			UiPush()
+    				if not HasTag(Animators[i], 'Dead') then
+    					UiColor(1,0,0)
+    				else
+    					UiColor(0.55,0,0)
+    				end
+    				UiTranslate((UiCenter()/5)+(55*4)-GetAnimatorTransform(Animators[i]).pos[1]/20*55, GetAnimatorTransform(Animators[i]).pos[3]/20*55)
+    				UiAlign("bottom right")
+    				UiCircle(10)
+    			UiPop()
+    		end
+    	end
+    UiPop()
+    UiPush()
+    	UiColor(0,1,0)
+    	UiTranslate((UiCenter()/5)+(55*4)-GetPlayerTransform(playerId).pos[1]/20*55, 100)
+    	UiAlign("bottom right")
+    	UiCircle(10)
+    UiPop()
+end
+

```

```diff
+#version 2
 function CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, name, xml, defaultlayers, layerOptions)
 	mapMenuStructure[#mapMenuStructure+1]={name=name,xml=xml,icon="MOD/TABS/icon/map-thumbnails/"..name..".png",defaultlayers=defaultlayers,layerOptions=layerOptions}
 end
 
+function server.init()
+    mapMenuStructure = {}
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Test Range", "servakus_napratsyuvannya.xml", nil, {{name="Day",layers=""},{name="Night",layers="removeday envnight"}})
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "NPC Test Environment", "NPC Test Environment.xml", nil)
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Test Range (Old)", "test_range.xml")
+    --CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Tutorial", "tutorial.xml")
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Buildings", "buildings.xml")
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Desert Storm", "desert storm.xml")
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Eastern Ukrainian City", "donetsk.xml", nil, {{name="Day",layers=""},{name="Night",layers="removeday envnight"},{name="Snow",layers="removeday envsnow"},{name="Conflict (Day)",layers="military soldiers fortnitifications"}})
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Donetsk (Old)", "donetsk_old.xml")
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Field", "Field.xml")
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "French Town", "French_Town.xml",{{name="Day",layers="envday"},{name="Night",layers="-envday envnight"}})
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "French Town (Old)", "frenchStenchMap.xml")
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Hamburg", "hamburg.xml")
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Kursk", "kursk.xml")
+    -- CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Museum", "museum.xml")
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Frontline Ukrainian Farmland", "ua_field.xml", nil, {{name="Day",layers=""},{name="Night",layers="removeday envnight"},{name="Snow",layers="removeday envsnow"}})
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Frontline Ukrainian Fields", "ua_field_2.xml", nil, {{name="Day",layers=""},{name="Night",layers="removeday envnight"},{name="Snow",layers="removeday envsnow"}})
+    CreateMap(mapMenuStructure, "Manulistan Outskirts", "Manulistan.xml")
+    selectedMap = ""
+    SOUNDS = LoadTABSSounds()
+end
 
+function client.draw()
+    PlayLoop(SOUNDS.UI_Amb)
+    UiAlign("top left")
 
-function draw(dt)
-	PlayLoop(SOUNDS.UI_Amb)
-	UiAlign("top left")

+    	UiColor(0,0,0)

-	UiPush()
-		UiColor(1,1,1)
-		UiImageBox("MOD/TABS/img/ui-background.png",UiWidth(),UiHeight(), 0, 0)

-		UiImageBox("ui/common/hgradient-left-64.png",UiWidth(),UiHeight(), 0, 0)
-	UiPop()
-	UiBackground(UiWidth(),UiHeight(),"[TABS] Maps",.3)
+    local iw, ih = 468, 263 --372, 209 --263, 148 --468, 263

-			UiPush()

-					UiTranslate(0,oh+hs)
```

# Migration Report: S-Bombs\Splosions.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff

-function tick(dt)
-	DebugWatch('Splosion.lua #spallHandler.shells',#spallHandler.shells)
-	local spallToRemove={}
-	local i = 1
-	local removeStart
-	while i < spallHandler.shellNum do
-		local shell=spallHandler.shells[i]
-		if shell.active then
-			ProjectileOperations(shell)
-		else
-			if not removeStart then removeStart = i end
-			spallToRemove[i]=true
-		end
-		i=i+1
-	end
-
-	if InputDown("ctrl") and InputPressed("q") then
-		debuglines = {}
-		debugholes = {}
-	end
-
-	local spallRemoved=0
-	for i = removeStart or spallHandler.shellNum, spallHandler.shellNum-1 do
-		if spallToRemove[i] then
-			spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved]=nil
-			spallRemoved=spallRemoved+1
-		end
-		spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved+1],spallHandler.shells[i+1] = spallHandler.shells[i+1],spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved+1]
-	end
-	spallHandler.shellNum=spallHandler.shellNum-spallRemoved
-
-	if InputPressed("q") then
-		drawdebug = not drawdebug
-	end
-
-	if drawdebug then
-		DebugShooting()
-	end
-end
-
-
-function update(dt)
-	Splosives = FindBodies("Splosion",true)
-	for i=1,#Splosives do
-		Splosive = Splosives[i]
-		Species = GetTagValue(Splosive, "Splosion")
-		local ValidExplosive = Species ~= nil and Devices[Species] ~= nil and Devices[Species]["Name"] ~= nil
-
-		if ValidExplosive then --Checks if explosive device is registered
-			--DebugPrint("SPECIES: "..Devices[Species]["Name"])
-			CheckArming(Splosive,Species)
-
-			if HasTag(Splosive, "Fuse") then
-				FuseTime = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "Fuse"))
-				FuseTime = FuseTime - dt
-				SetTag(Splosive, "Fuse", tostring(FuseTime))
-				if FuseTime < 0 then
-					
-					local Initialised = HasTag(Splosive, "Glare")
-					if not Initialised then
-						SetBodyDynamic(Splosive, false)
-						local tr = GetBodyTransform(Splosive)
-						tr.pos[2] = tr.pos[2]-30
-						SetBodyTransform(Splosive,tr)
-						Position = tr.pos
-						Position[2] = Position[2] + 30
-
-						Splosion(Position, Devices[Species]["Violence"], Devices[Species]["ParticleAmount"], Devices[Species]["ExplosionDamage"], Devices[Species]["ParticleSize"])
-
-						SetTag(Splosive, "Glare", Devices[Species]["Glare"]*10^Val[Glare])
-						SetTag(Splosive, "Shockwave", Devices[Species]["Shockwave"])
-						SetTag(Splosive, "ShrpT", 0)
-						SetTag(Splosive, "SndT", 0)
-						if Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] == "realistic" and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
-							debuglines = {}
-							debugholes = {}
-							if Devices[Species]["Shaped"] then
-								ShapedTrans = GetBodyTransform(Splosive)
-								Dir = TransformToParentVec(ShapedTrans,Vec(0,0,1))
-						Spall(Position, VecScale(Dir,Devices[Species]["RShrapVelocity"]), Devices[Species]["RShrapnel"]*(10^Val[Shrapnel]), 0.3, Devices[Species]["RShrapnelPen"])
-					else
-						if Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
-						Spall(Position, Vec(0,Devices[Species]["RShrapVelocity"],0), Devices[Species]["RShrapnel"]*(10^Val[Shrapnel]), 1, Devices[Species]["RShrapnelPen"])
-						end
-							end
-						end
-						if Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel] > 0 then
-							maxdist = 1
-							damagemax = 100
-							--for z=1,Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel] do
-								--damagemax = damagemax - 100/Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel]
-								--maxdist = maxdist + 50/Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel]
-								--if damagemax <= 1 then
-								--	damagemax = 1
-								--end
-								--Shoot(Position, RSV(0.01), "gun", math.random(1,damagemax)/200, maxdist)
-								--local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(Vec(math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10)), Vec(math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10)), 70)
-								--DebugPrint(dist)
-							--end
-						end
-					else
-						Position = GetBodyTransform(Splosive).pos
-						Position[2] = Position[2] + 30
-
-					
-						GlareT = GetTagValue(Splosive, "Glare")
-						GlareT = GlareT - dt
-						SetTag(Splosive, "Glare", GlareT)
-						if GlareT > 0 then 
-							PointLight(Position, 1, 0.7, 0.3, Devices[Species]["Flash"]*10^Val[Flash]*GlareT)
-						else
-							SetTag(Splosive, "NoL")
-						end
-
-						if not HasTag(Splosive, "NoShrp") and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "realistic" and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
-							ShrpT = GetTagValue(Splosive, "ShrpT")
-							ShrpT = ShrpT + dt*(Devices[Species]["ShrapVel"]*8.2)
-							SetTag(Splosive, "ShrpT", ShrpT)
-							CreateShrapnel(Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*ShrpT/30*(10^Val[Shrapnel]),Position)
-							--DebugPrint(ShrpT)
-							if not(ShrpT < Devices[Species]["ShrapMaxDist"]) then 
-								SetTag(Splosive, "NoShrp")
-							end
-						end
-
-						if not HasTag(Splosive, "NoSnd") then
-
-						SndT = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "SndT"))
-						SndT = SndT + dt*250
-						--DebugPrint(SndT)
-						SetTag(Splosive, "SndT", tostring(SndT))
-						playerpos = GetPlayerCameraTransform().pos
-						DistToPlayer = VecLength(VecSub(Position, playerpos))
-						if SndT > DistToPlayer then
-						SetTag(Splosive, "NoSnd")
-						local smallRange = 20
-						local mediumRange = 45
-						local largeRange = 100
-
-						local largeVolume = math.max(0, math.min(1, (DistToPlayer - mediumRange) / (largeRange - mediumRange)))
-						local mediumVolume = math.max(0, math.min(1, (DistToPlayer - smallRange) / (mediumRange - smallRange))) - largeVolume
-						local smallVolume = math.max(0, (smallRange - DistToPlayer) / smallRange)
-						if mediumVolume == 0 and largeVolume == 0 then
-							mediumVolume = 1 - smallVolume
-						end
-						if mediumVolume < 1 and largeVolume == 0 then
-							mediumVolume = 1 - smallVolume
-						end
-
-						PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."SDist"),Position,smallVolume)
-						PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."MDist"),playerpos,mediumVolume)
-						PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."LDist"),playerpos,largeVolume)
-
-						--DebugPrint("Small range volume: "..smallVolume)
-						--DebugPrint("Medium range volume: "..mediumVolume)
-						--DebugPrint("Large range volume: "..largeVolume)
-
-						end
-
-						end
-
-						if Devices[Species]["Shockwave"] > 0 and not HasTag(Splosive, "NoS") then
-							Stim = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "Shockwave"))
-							Stim = Stim - dt*65
-							SetTag(Splosive, "Shockwave", tostring(Stim))
-							Shockwave(Position, Devices[Species]["Violence"], Devices[Species]["ParticleAmount"], Devices[Species]["ExplosionDamage"], Devices[Species]["ParticleSize"],Stim*2)
-							if Stim < 0 then
-								SetTag(Splosive, "NoS")
-							end
-						end
-						if Devices[Species]["Shockwave"] == 0 then
-							SetTag(Splosive, "NoS")
-						end
-
-						if HasTag(Splosive, "NoS") and HasTag(Splosive, "NoL") and HasTag(Splosive, "NoShrp") then
-							Delete(Splosive)
-						end
-
-					end
-				end
-			end
-
-		else
-		DebugPrint("Unknown explosive device detected, this explosive device will not work, make sure the table name of the device matches the splosion tag")
-		end
-
 	end
 end

+    		PType = "plain", -- particle Type

+    		PLife = 7, -- particle lifetime
+    		BDebri = true, -- Debri bool, determines if debri is expelled by explosion
+    		ShockParticleSize = 0.01, -- Shockwave particle size

+    		PR = 0.5,
+    		PG = 0.5,
+    		PB = 0.5,
+    		PA = 1,
+    		PD = 0.3,
+    		Flash = 2350,
+    		Glare = 3,
+    		DynamicRange = 141,
+    		PGr = 7,
+    		Edmg = 3,
+    		MaxShrapSize = 40,
+    		ShrapVel = 500,
+    		ShrapCollide = 0,
+    		ShrapMaxDist = 700,
+    		ShrapDamageMax = 2,
+    		ExtraUpVel = 8,
+    		ShrapnelType = "fast",
+    		Shaped = false;
+    	},
+    	Cooker = {
+    		--BASIC INFO
+    		Type = "IED", -- Type of the explosive device
+    		Name = "Pressure Cooker", -- Name of the explosive device
+    		RequireArm = true, -- Require arm adds a difference between explosive devices that can be armed (for example grenades) and explosives that cant be armed (barrel of gunpowder)
+    		Fuse = 3.2, -- How much time it takes for the explosive to detonate, only works if requirearm is true
+    		--DAMAGE
+    		ExplosionDamage = 1, -- Amount of damage directly done to the environment by the explosive
+    		Edmg = 5, -- Pressure damage done by explosive
+    		--SHOCKWAVE
+    		Force = 5, -- Maximum force applied to objects
+    		ForceRange = 2, -- does nothing atm
+    		Shockwave = 1, -- Amount of shockwave particles
+    		--PARTICLES
+    		ParticleAmount = 90, -- How dense the particles for the explosion are going to be
+    		ShockParticleSize = 0.1, -- Shockwave particle size
+    		PType = "plain", -- particle Type
+    		PC = 0, -- particle collide
+    		DG = -1, -- debri gravity
+    		PLife = 7, -- particle lifetime
+    		BDebri = true, -- Debri bool, determines if debri is expelled by explosion
+    		ShockParticleSize = 0.01, -- Shockwave particle size
+    		ParticleSize = {0.8, 15},-- Explosion particle size
+    		PR = 0.9, -- Particle red
+    		PG = 0.9, -- Particle green
+    		PB = 0.9, -- particle blue
+    		PA = 1, -- particle alpha
+    		PD = 0.5, -- particle drag
+    		PGr = 1, -- particle gravity
+    		ExtraUpVel = 10, -- How much the smoke will move upwards
+    		Violence = 23, -- How fast the particles from the explosion will travel
+    		--LIGHTS
+    		Flash = 30, -- strength of explosion flash 
+    		Glare = 0.3, -- how long the explosion flash will stay
+    		DynamicRange = 3, -- maximum distance the explosion can affect objects at
+    		--FAST SHRAPNEL
+    		Shrapnel = 10,  -- Amount of shrapnel ejected by the explosive over time
+    		MaxShrapSize = 2, -- maximum size of shrapnel (VISUAL ONLY)
+    		ShrapVel = 80, -- maximum shrapnel velocity (VISUAL ONLY)
+    		ShrapCollide = 0, -- Will shrapnel collide
+    		ShrapMaxDist = 70, -- Maximum distance the shrapnel can travel
+    		ShrapDamageMax = 0.5, -- Maximum amount of damage done by shrapnel depending on distance
+    		ShrapnelType = "realistic", -- Type of shrapnel, can be either fast or realistic
+    		--REALISTIC SHRAPNEL
+    		RShrapnel = 70, -- Amount of realistic shrapnel, only spawned at explosion so it has to be higher than fast shrapnel
+    		RShrapnelPen = 6, -- Amount of realistic shrapnel penetration
+    		RShrapVelocity = 7, -- The speed of the realistic shrapnel
+    		Shaped = false;
+    	},
+    	Smoke_1 = {
+    		--BASIC INFO
+    		Type = "plain", -- Type of the explosive device
+    		Name = "Smoke_1", -- Name of the explosive device
+    		RequireArm = true, -- Require arm adds a difference between explosive devices that can be armed (for example grenades) and explosives that cant be armed (barrel of gunpowder)
+    		Fuse = 1.2, -- How much time it takes for the explosive to detonate, only works if requirearm is true
+    		--DAMAGE
+    		ExplosionDamage = 0.2, -- Amount of damage directly done to the environment by the explosive
+    		Edmg = 0.1, -- Pressure damage done by explosive
+    		--SHOCKWAVE
+    		Force = 0.1, -- Maximum force applied to objects
+    		ForceRange = 0.1, -- does nothing atm
+    		Shockwave = 0.1, -- Amount of shockwave particles
+    		--PARTICLES
+    		PType = "smoke", -- particle Type
+    		PC = 1, -- particle collide
+    		DG = -1, -- debri gravity
+    		PLife = 32, -- particle lifetime
+    		BDebri = false, -- Debri bool, determines if debri is expelled by explosion
+    		ParticleAmount = 220, -- How dense the particles for the explosion are going to be
+    		ShockParticleSize = 0.01, -- Shockwave particle size
+    		ParticleSize = {0.8, 15},-- Explosion particle size
+    		PR = 0.8, -- Particle red
+    		PG = 0.8, -- Particle green
+    		PB = 0.8, -- particle blue
+    		PA = 1, -- particle alpha
+    		PD = 0.6, -- particle drag
+    		PGr = -0.2, -- particle gravity
+    		ExtraUpVel = 1, -- How much the smoke will move upwards
+    		Violence = 43, -- How fast the particles from the explosion will travel
+    		--LIGHTS
+    		Flash = 10, -- strength of explosion flash 
+    		Glare = 0.1, -- how long the explosion flash will stay
+    		DynamicRange = 0.01, -- maximum distance the explosion can affect objects at
+    		--FAST SHRAPNEL
+    		Shrapnel = 10,  -- Amount of shrapnel ejected by the explosive over time
+    		MaxShrapSize = 2, -- maximum size of shrapnel (VISUAL ONLY)
+    		ShrapVel = 80, -- maximum shrapnel velocity (VISUAL ONLY)
+    		ShrapCollide = 0, -- Will shrapnel collide
+    		ShrapMaxDist = 70, -- Maximum distance the shrapnel can travel
+    		ShrapDamageMax = 0.5, -- Maximum amount of damage done by shrapnel depending on distance
+    		ShrapnelType = "none", -- Type of shrapnel, can be either fast or realistic
+    		--REALISTIC SHRAPNEL
+    		RShrapnel = 70, -- Amount of realistic shrapnel, only spawned at explosion so it has to be higher than fast shrapnel
+    		RShrapnelPen = 6, -- Amount of realistic shrapnel penetration
+    		RShrapVelocity = 7, -- The speed of the realistic shrapnel
+    		Shaped = false;
+    	},
+    }
+    Stim = 0
+    armvel = 0
+     MaxDist = 17
+    InitTesting()
+    InitBallistics()
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        DebugWatch('Splosion.lua #spallHandler.shells',#spallHandler.shells)
+        local spallToRemove={}
+        local i = 1
+        local removeStart
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        Splosives = FindBodies("Splosion",true)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    while i < spallHandler.shellNum do
+    	local shell=spallHandler.shells[i]
+    	if shell.active then
+    		ProjectileOperations(shell)
+    	else
+    		if not removeStart then removeStart = i end
+    		spallToRemove[i]=true
+    	end
+    	i=i+1
+    end
+
+    if InputDown("ctrl") and InputPressed("q") then
+    	debuglines = {}
+    	debugholes = {}
+    end
+
+    local spallRemoved=0
+    for i = removeStart or spallHandler.shellNum, spallHandler.shellNum-1 do
+    	if spallToRemove[i] then
+    		spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved]=nil
+    		spallRemoved=spallRemoved+1
+    	end
+    	spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved+1],spallHandler.shells[i+1] = spallHandler.shells[i+1],spallHandler.shells[i-spallRemoved+1]
+    end
+    spallHandler.shellNum=spallHandler.shellNum-spallRemoved
+
+    if InputPressed("q") then
+    	drawdebug = not drawdebug
+    end
+
+    if drawdebug then
+    	DebugShooting()
+    end
+end
+
+function client.update(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    for i=1,#Splosives do
+    	Splosive = Splosives[i]
+    	Species = GetTagValue(Splosive, "Splosion")
+    	local ValidExplosive = Species ~= nil and Devices[Species] ~= nil and Devices[Species]["Name"] ~= nil
+
+    	if ValidExplosive then --Checks if explosive device is registered
+    		--DebugPrint("SPECIES: "..Devices[Species]["Name"])
+    		CheckArming(Splosive,Species)
+
+    		if HasTag(Splosive, "Fuse") then
+    			FuseTime = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "Fuse"))
+    			FuseTime = FuseTime - dt
+    			SetTag(Splosive, "Fuse", tostring(FuseTime))
+    			if FuseTime < 0 then
+
+    				local Initialised = HasTag(Splosive, "Glare")
+    				if not Initialised then
+    					SetBodyDynamic(Splosive, false)
+    					local tr = GetBodyTransform(Splosive)
+    					tr.pos[2] = tr.pos[2]-30
+    					SetBodyTransform(Splosive,tr)
+    					Position = tr.pos
+    					Position[2] = Position[2] + 30
+
+    					Splosion(Position, Devices[Species]["Violence"], Devices[Species]["ParticleAmount"], Devices[Species]["ExplosionDamage"], Devices[Species]["ParticleSize"])
+
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "Glare", Devices[Species]["Glare"]*10^Val[Glare])
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "Shockwave", Devices[Species]["Shockwave"])
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "ShrpT", 0)
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "SndT", 0)
+    					if Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] == "realistic" and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
+    						debuglines = {}
+    						debugholes = {}
+    						if Devices[Species]["Shaped"] then
+    							ShapedTrans = GetBodyTransform(Splosive)
+    							Dir = TransformToParentVec(ShapedTrans,Vec(0,0,1))
+    					Spall(Position, VecScale(Dir,Devices[Species]["RShrapVelocity"]), Devices[Species]["RShrapnel"]*(10^Val[Shrapnel]), 0.3, Devices[Species]["RShrapnelPen"])
+    				else
+    					if Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
+    					Spall(Position, Vec(0,Devices[Species]["RShrapVelocity"],0), Devices[Species]["RShrapnel"]*(10^Val[Shrapnel]), 1, Devices[Species]["RShrapnelPen"])
+    					end
+    						end
+    					end
+    					if Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel] > 0 then
+    						maxdist = 1
+    						damagemax = 100
+    						--for z=1,Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel] do
+    							--damagemax = damagemax - 100/Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel]
+    							--maxdist = maxdist + 50/Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*10^Val[Shrapnel]
+    							--if damagemax <= 1 then
+    							--	damagemax = 1
+    							--end
+    							--Shoot(Position, RSV(0.01), "gun", math.random(1,damagemax)/200, maxdist)
+    							--local hit, dist, normal, shape = QueryRaycast(Vec(math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10)), Vec(math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10),math.random(1,10)), 70)
+    							--DebugPrint(dist)
+    						--end
+    					end
+    				else
+    					Position = GetBodyTransform(Splosive).pos
+    					Position[2] = Position[2] + 30
+
+    					GlareT = GetTagValue(Splosive, "Glare")
+    					GlareT = GlareT - dt
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "Glare", GlareT)
+    					if GlareT ~= 0 then 
+    						PointLight(Position, 1, 0.7, 0.3, Devices[Species]["Flash"]*10^Val[Flash]*GlareT)
+    					else
+    						SetTag(Splosive, "NoL")
+    					end
+
+    					if not HasTag(Splosive, "NoShrp") and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "realistic" and Devices[Species]["ShrapnelType"] ~= "none" then
+    						ShrpT = GetTagValue(Splosive, "ShrpT")
+    						ShrpT = ShrpT + dt*(Devices[Species]["ShrapVel"]*8.2)
+    						SetTag(Splosive, "ShrpT", ShrpT)
+    						CreateShrapnel(Devices[Species]["Shrapnel"]*ShrpT/30*(10^Val[Shrapnel]),Position)
+    						--DebugPrint(ShrpT)
+    						if not(ShrpT < Devices[Species]["ShrapMaxDist"]) then 
+    							SetTag(Splosive, "NoShrp")
+    						end
+    					end
+
+    					if not HasTag(Splosive, "NoSnd") then
+
+    					SndT = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "SndT"))
+    					SndT = SndT + dt*250
+    					--DebugPrint(SndT)
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "SndT", tostring(SndT))
+    					playerpos = GetPlayerCameraTransform(playerId).pos
+    					DistToPlayer = VecLength(VecSub(Position, playerpos))
+    					if SndT > DistToPlayer then
+    					SetTag(Splosive, "NoSnd")
+    					local smallRange = 20
+    					local mediumRange = 45
+    					local largeRange = 100
+
+    					local largeVolume = math.max(0, math.min(1, (DistToPlayer - mediumRange) / (largeRange - mediumRange)))
+    					local mediumVolume = math.max(0, math.min(1, (DistToPlayer - smallRange) / (mediumRange - smallRange))) - largeVolume
+    					local smallVolume = math.max(0, (smallRange - DistToPlayer) / smallRange)
+    					if mediumVolume == 0 and largeVolume == 0 then
+    						mediumVolume = 1 - smallVolume
+    					end
+    					if mediumVolume < 1 and largeVolume == 0 then
+    						mediumVolume = 1 - smallVolume
+    					end
+
+    					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."SDist"),Position,smallVolume)
+    					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."MDist"),playerpos,mediumVolume)
+    					PlaySound(LoadSound("MOD/S-Bombs/Sound/"..Devices[Species]["Name"].."LDist"),playerpos,largeVolume)
+
+    					--DebugPrint("Small range volume: "..smallVolume)
+    					--DebugPrint("Medium range volume: "..mediumVolume)
+    					--DebugPrint("Large range volume: "..largeVolume)
+
+    					end
+
+    					end
+
+    					if Devices[Species]["Shockwave"] > 0 and not HasTag(Splosive, "NoS") then
+    						Stim = tonumber(GetTagValue(Splosive, "Shockwave"))
+    						Stim = Stim - dt*65
+    						SetTag(Splosive, "Shockwave", tostring(Stim))
+    						Shockwave(Position, Devices[Species]["Violence"], Devices[Species]["ParticleAmount"], Devices[Species]["ExplosionDamage"], Devices[Species]["ParticleSize"],Stim*2)
+    						if Stim < 0 then
+    							SetTag(Splosive, "NoS")
+    						end
+    					end
+    					if Devices[Species]["Shockwave"] == 0 then
+    						SetTag(Splosive, "NoS")
+    					end
+
+    					if HasTag(Splosive, "NoS") and HasTag(Splosive, "NoL") and HasTag(Splosive, "NoShrp") then
+    						Delete(Splosive)
+    					end
+
+    				end
+    			end
+    		end
+
+    	else
+    	DebugPrint("Unknown explosive device detected, this explosive device will not work, make sure the table name of the device matches the splosion tag")
+    	end
+
+    end
+end
+

```

```diff
+    InitOptions()

+    customAttachments = {}

+    	casingEmitDir=Vec(.1,.7,.3),
+    	casingType="rifle-2",
+    	magSize=20,
+    	fireRate=900,
+    	accuracy=.0020,
+    	fireModes={'full'},
+    	selectorAngles={0,54},
+    	weightFactor=.9,
+    	recoilVertical=1,
+    	recoilHorizontal=1.6,
+    	recoilWander=1,
+    	recoilKickRot=5,
+    	recoilMax=15,
+    	recoilKick=.03,
+    	recoilKickRot=20,
+    	kickOverlap=.5,
+    	vertTravelMult=2,
+    	reloadTime=2.5,
+    	reloadTypes={"standard-angled"},
+    	reloadAngleFraction=.35,
+    	magInSoundDelay=.1,
+    	chargeTypes={"pistol-slide"},
+    	barrelPitchAngle=3,
+    	boltTime=.4,
+    	boltRecoilDist=.1,
+    })
+    InitAnimationVariables(weaponHandler)
+    defaultAttachments = {}
+    InitAttachmentHandler({
+    	["Ammo"]={
+    		attachments={"pg7v","og7v","pg7vt","gtb7m"},
+    		order=1,
+    	},
+    	["Dovetail"]={
+    		attachments={"rpg7sights","pgo-7"},
+    		order=2,
+    	},
+    })
+    -- Generic shared weapon sounds
+    SOUNDS = InitSounds()
+    -- Weapon-specific sounds
+    ConvertFilePaths()
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponBackgroundTick(dt)
+        if GetString("game.player.tool") == toolID and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == 0 then
+
+        	WeaponInputs()
+
+        	local b = GetToolBody()
+        	if b ~= 0 then
+
+        		if loadToolDelay ~= 0 then
+        			loadToolDelay = loadToolDelay - 1
+        		elseif loadToolDelay == 0 then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			loadToolDelay = -1
+        		end
+
+        		WeaponTick(dt)
+
+        		SetBool("hud.aimdot", false, true)
+
+        		local targetTransform, targetFOV = GetWeaponTransform(dt)
+        		local weaponTransform = AnimateWeapon(targetTransform, targetFOV)
+        		SetHandTransforms()
+        		ManageHands(b)
+        		SetToolTransform(weaponTransform, .2)
+
+        		if body ~= b then
+        			LoadTool(b, weaponPrefab)
+        			body = b
+        		end
+
+        	end
+        else
+        	WeaponUnselectedTick(dt)
+        end
+    end
+end
+
+function server.update(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        WeaponUpdate(dt)
+    end
+end
+
+function client.init()
+    SOUNDS.weaponFire = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.weaponFireSup = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_sup_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.selectFire = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/selectorswitch_ar_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.dryFire = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/dryfire_0.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magOut = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magout.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.magIn = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_magin.ogg")
+    SOUNDS.cock = LoadSound("TABS/TABS/sounds/weapons/small arms/g17/g17_slide.ogg")
+end
+
+function client.draw()
+    WeaponDraw(dt)
+end
+
```

```diff
-  if GetPlayerVehicle() == vehicle then

-  
-  
-  
-    bTra = GetBodyTransform(body)

-    _, _, rolAng = GetQuatEuler(bRot)
-    locLinVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyVelocity(body))
-    locAngVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyAngularVelocity(body))

-    for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
-      SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0, 2)
-    end
-    newLeanV = getNewLeanVelocity(inp, locLinVel[1], rolAng, delta)
-    newTrnVel = getNewTurnVelocity(math.abs(locLinVel[3]), locAngVel[2])
-    DampedAngVel = Vec(locAngVel[1], newTrnVel, newLeanV)
-    gloLeanVel = QuatRotateVec(bRot, DampedAngVel)
-    SetBodyAngularVelocity(body, gloLeanVel)
-  else
-    for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
-      SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0.5, 2)
-    end
-    SetJointMotorTarget(hedJoint, 0)
-  end
-  
-  		if InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerVehicle() == vehicle and cooldown_wheelie ~= 0 and not InputDown("q") and speed > 10 then  --if driving
-			--DebugPrint("working")
-			local vel2 = Vec(0 ,2, 0)
-			local linVel = GetBodyVelocity(body)
-				SetBodyVelocity(wheel_point, VecAdd(vel2,linVel))
-				cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie - 1 
-				else if InputDown("shift") and cooldown_wheelie == 0 then
-				cooldown_wheelie = 0
-				else if cooldown_wheelie < 300 then
-				cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie + 10
-				end
-			end
-		end 
-  
-  
-  --DebugWatch("cooldownwheelie", cooldown_wheelie)
-  
-  --DebugWatch("getbodyvelocity", bodyvel)
-  --DebugWatch("speed", speed)
-
-end
-
+#version 2
 function getNewLeanVelocity(steerInp, sliVel, rollAng, delta)
   leanTarg = math.tanh((steerInp * leanInpFac)+(sliVel * velLnFac))* maxLeanAng
   newAng = lerp(newAng, leanTarg, delta * 2)
@@ -94,4 +20,74 @@
 
 function lerp(current, target, factor)
   return current + ((target - current) * factor)
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+     vehicle = FindVehicle("bike")
+     body = FindBody("bikeBod")
+     hedJoint = FindJoint("bikeHeadJoint")
+     bikStand = FindJoints("bikeStand")
+     --head tuning
+     maxHdAng = 20
+     hdTrnSpd = 1
+     --lean tuning
+     maxLeanAng = 30 
+     maxLeanVel = 5
+     leanInpFac = 0.5
+     velLnFac = 0.03
+     --turn tuning
+     maxTurnYaw = 2 
+     fwrdAtnTar = 1000 
+     --variable inits
+     newAng = 0
+    cooldown_wheelie = 300
+    wheel_point = FindBody("wheel_point")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        	end
+        end 
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == vehicle then
+    bodyvel = GetBodyVelocity(body)
+    speed = VecLength(bodyvel)
+
+      bTra = GetBodyTransform(body)
+      bRot = bTra.rot
+      _, _, rolAng = GetQuatEuler(bRot)
+      locLinVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyVelocity(body))
+      locAngVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyAngularVelocity(body))
+      inp = (InputValue("left") - InputValue("right"))
+      SetJointMotorTarget(hedJoint, inp * maxHdAng, 1)
+      for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
+        SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0, 2)
+      end
+      newLeanV = getNewLeanVelocity(inp, locLinVel[1], rolAng, delta)
+      newTrnVel = getNewTurnVelocity(math.abs(locLinVel[3]), locAngVel[2])
+      DampedAngVel = Vec(locAngVel[1], newTrnVel, newLeanV)
+      gloLeanVel = QuatRotateVec(bRot, DampedAngVel)
+      SetBodyAngularVelocity(body, gloLeanVel)
+    else
+      for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
+        SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0.5, 2)
+      end
+      SetJointMotorTarget(hedJoint, 0)
+    end
+    		if InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == vehicle and cooldown_wheelie ~= 0 and not InputDown("q") and speed > 10 then  --if driving
+    	--DebugPrint("working")
+    	local vel2 = Vec(0 ,2, 0)
+    	local linVel = GetBodyVelocity(body)
+    		SetBodyVelocity(wheel_point, VecAdd(vel2,linVel))
+    		cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie - 1 
+    		else if InputDown("shift") and cooldown_wheelie == 0 then
+    		cooldown_wheelie = 0
+    		else if cooldown_wheelie < 300 then
+    		cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie + 10
+    		end
+end
+

```

```diff
+#version 2
 function getNewLeanVelocity(steerInp, sliVel, rollAng, delta)
   leanTarg = math.tanh((steerInp * leanInpFac)+(sliVel * velLnFac))* maxLeanAng
   newAng = lerp(newAng, leanTarg, delta * 2)
@@ -94,4 +20,74 @@
 
 function lerp(current, target, factor)
   return current + ((target - current) * factor)
-end+end
+
+function server.init()
+     vehicle = FindVehicle("bike")
+     body = FindBody("bikeBod")
+     hedJoint = FindJoint("bikeHeadJoint")
+     bikStand = FindJoints("bikeStand")
+     --head tuning
+     maxHdAng = 20
+     hdTrnSpd = 1
+     --lean tuning
+     maxLeanAng = 1 
+     maxLeanVel = 1
+     leanInpFac = 0.5
+     velLnFac = 0.03
+     --turn tuning
+     maxTurnYaw = 2 
+     fwrdAtnTar = 1000 
+     --variable inits
+     newAng = 0
+    cooldown_wheelie = 300
+    wheel_point = FindBody("wheel_point")
+end
+
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        	end
+        end 
+    end
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == vehicle then
+    bodyvel = GetBodyVelocity(body)
+    speed = VecLength(bodyvel)
+
+      bTra = GetBodyTransform(body)
+      bRot = bTra.rot
+      _, _, rolAng = GetQuatEuler(bRot)
+      locLinVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyVelocity(body))
+      locAngVel = TransformToLocalVec(bTra, GetBodyAngularVelocity(body))
+      inp = (InputValue("left") - InputValue("right"))
+      SetJointMotorTarget(hedJoint, inp * maxHdAng, 1)
+      for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
+        SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0, 2)
+      end
+      newLeanV = getNewLeanVelocity(inp, locLinVel[1], rolAng, delta)
+      newTrnVel = getNewTurnVelocity(math.abs(locLinVel[3]), locAngVel[2])
+      DampedAngVel = Vec(locAngVel[1], newTrnVel, newLeanV)
+      gloLeanVel = QuatRotateVec(bRot, DampedAngVel)
+      SetBodyAngularVelocity(body, gloLeanVel)
+    else
+      for _,stand in pairs(bikStand) do
+        SetJointMotorTarget(stand, 0.5, 2)
+      end
+      SetJointMotorTarget(hedJoint, 0)
+    end
+    		if InputDown("shift") and GetPlayerVehicle(playerId) == vehicle and cooldown_wheelie ~= 0 and not InputDown("q") and speed > 10 then  --if driving
+    	--DebugPrint("working")
+    	local vel2 = Vec(0 ,2, 0)
+    	local linVel = GetBodyVelocity(body)
+    		SetBodyVelocity(wheel_point, VecAdd(vel2,linVel))
+    		cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie - 1 
+    		else if InputDown("shift") and cooldown_wheelie == 0 then
+    		cooldown_wheelie = 0
+    		else if cooldown_wheelie < 300 then
+    		cooldown_wheelie = cooldown_wheelie + 10
+    		end
+end
+

```

```diff
+function server.init()
+    if pRandom ~= 0 then
+    	Randomize(pRandom)
+    end
+    wood = CreateBrush(pTrunkBrush)
+    leaves = {}
+    local rD = RandomFloat(0.30, 0.34)*pDarknessFactor
+    local gD = RandomFloat(0.37, 0.42)*pDarknessFactor
+    local bD = RandomFloat(0.28, 0.32)*pDarknessFactor
+    local rB = (RandomFloat(0.41, 0.46)*pBrightnessFactor-rD)/8
+    local gB = (RandomFloat(0.50, 0.56)*pBrightnessFactor-gD)/8
+    local bB = (RandomFloat(0.39, 0.44)*pBrightnessFactor-bD)/8
+    for i=1, 8 do
+    	--leaves[i] = CreateMaterial("foliage", t*0.9, t*RandomFloat(0.8, 1.3), t)
+    	leaves[i] = CreateMaterial("foliage", rD+rB*i, gD+gB*i, bD+bB*i)
+    	--leaves[i] = CreateMaterial("foliage", rB*8, gB*8, bB*8)
+    end
+    Vox()
+    generateBranches(0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 1)
+    generateLeaves()
+    Material(0)
+    Box(-pTrunkWidth, -pTrunkWidth, -pTrunkWidth, pTrunkWidth, 0, pTrunkWidth)
+end
+
```

```diff
+    				UiFont("regular.ttf", 26)
+    				if lang == 0 then

+    				elseif lang == 1 then

+    				elseif lang == 2 then

+    				elseif lang == 3 then

+    				elseif lang == 4 then

+    				elseif lang == 5 then

+    				elseif lang == 6 then

+    				elseif lang == 7 then

+    				elseif lang == 8 then
+    					UiText("Klakson")
+    				end
+    			UiPop()

+    end
+end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\common.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\common.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\common.lua

---==================--
--- VECTOR FUNCTIONS --
---==================--
-
---Returns the turning difference between 2 vectors along the turning axis
---It is 0 when they are facing same way, -0.5 when desired is exactly to right, +-1 when exactly behind
---Thus the result is going from 0 to +-1 is the angle facing away from the ideal direction, turning axis is the axis of rotation around which the angle is checked
+#version 2
 function VecFacingDifference(CurrentVec,DesiredVec,CurrentRight,TurningAxis)
 
 	--I'm not sure why the calculation is done like this
@@ -22,7 +16,7 @@

 		Result = d
 	else
 		if d<0 then
@@ -36,8 +30,6 @@

     if lower > upper then lower, upper = upper, lower end -- swap if boundaries supplied the wrong way
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\TDSU\tdsu.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\TDSU\tdsu.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\TDSU\tdsu.lua
@@ -1,32 +1,4 @@
---[[
-#include "umf.lua"
-#include "util_camera.lua"
-#include "util_color.lua"
-#include "util_debug.lua"
-#include "util_input.lua"
-#include "util_lua.lua"
-#include "util_math.lua"
-#include "util_quat.lua"
-#include "util_table.lua"
-#include "util_td.lua"
-#include "util_tool.lua"
-#include "util_ui.lua"
-#include "util_umf.lua"
-#include "util_vec.lua"
-#include "util_vfx.lua"
-]]
-
-
---================================================================
---Teardown Scripting Utilities (TDSU)
---By: Cheejins
---================================================================
-
-
--- _BOOLS = {} -- Control variable used for functions like CallOnce()
-
-
----INIT Initialize the utils library.
+#version 2
 function InitUtils()
 
     InitDebug()
@@ -37,9 +9,9 @@
 
 end
 
----TICK Manage and run the utils library.
 function TickUtils()
 
     TickDebug(DB, db)
 
 end
+

```

-local hook_compiled = {}
-
-local function recompile( event )
-	local hooks = {}
-	for k, v in pairs( hook_table[event] ) do
-		hooks[#hooks + 1] = v
-	end
-	hook_compiled[event] = hooks
-end
-
-hook = { table = hook_table }
-
---- Hooks a function to the specified event.
----
----@param event string
----@param identifier any
----@param func function
----@overload fun(event: string, func: function)
-function hook.add( event, identifier, func )
-	assert( type( event ) == "string", "Event must be a string" )
-	if func then
-		assert( identifier ~= nil, "Identifier must not be nil" )
-		assert( type( func ) == "function", "Callback must be a function" )
-	else
-		assert( type( identifier ) == "function", "Callback must be a function" )
-	end
-	hook_table[event] = hook_table[event] or {}
-	hook_table[event][identifier] = func or identifier
-	recompile( event )
-	return identifier
-end
-
---- Removes a hook to an event by its identifier.
----
----@param event string
----@param identifier any
-function hook.remove( event, identifier )
-	assert( type( event ) == "string", "Event must be a string" )
-	assert( identifier ~= nil, "Identifier must not be nil" )
-	if hook_table[event] then
-		hook_table[event][identifier] = nil
-		if next( hook_table[event] ) == nil then
-			hook_table[event] = nil
-			hook_compiled[event] = nil
-		else
-			recompile( event )
-		end
-	end
-end
-
---- Executes all hooks associated to an event.
----
----@param event string
----@return any
-function hook.run( event, ... )
-	local hooks = hook_compiled[event]
-	if not hooks then
-		return
-	end
-	for i = 1, #hooks do
-		local a, b, c, d, e = hooks[i]( ... )
-		if a ~= nil then
-			return a, b, c, d, e
-		end
-	end
-end
-
---- Executes all hooks associated to an event with `pcall`.
----
----@param event string
----@return any
-function hook.saferun( event, ... )
-	local hooks = hook_compiled[event]
-	if not hooks then
-		return
-	end
-	for i = 1, #hooks do
-		local s, a, b, c, d, e = softassert( pcall( hooks[i], ... ) )
-		if s and a ~= nil then
-			return a, b, c, d, e
-		end
-	end
-end
-
---- Tests if an event has hooks attached.
----
----@param event string
----@return boolean
-function hook.used( event )
-	return hook_table[event]
-end
-
-
- end)();
---src/util/detouring.lua
-(function() ----------------
--- Detour Utilities
--- @script util.detouring
-local original = {}
-local function call_original( name, ... )
-	local fn = original[name]
-	if fn then
-		return fn( ... )
-	end
-end
-
-local detoured = {}
---- Detours a global function even it gets reassigned afterwards.
----
----@param name string
----@param generator fun(original: function): function
-function DETOUR( name, generator )
-	original[name] = original[name] or rawget( _G, name )
-	detoured[name] = generator( function( ... )
-		return call_original( name, ... )
-	end )
-	rawset( _G, name, nil )
-end
-
-setmetatable( _G, {
-	__index = detoured,
-	__newindex = function( self, k, v )
-		if detoured[k] then
-			original[k] = v
-		else
-			rawset( self, k, v )
-		end
-	end,
-} )
-
- end)();
---src/core/hooks_base.lua
-(function() ----------------
--- Default hooks
--- @script core.hooks_base
-UMF_RUNLATER "UpdateQuickloadPatch()"
-
-local hook = hook
-
-local function checkoriginal( b, ... )
-	if not b then
-		printerror( ... )
-		return
-	end
-	return ...
-end
-
-local function simple_detour( name )
-	local event = "base." .. name
-	DETOUR( name, function( original )
-		return function( ... )
-			hook.saferun( event, ... )
-			return checkoriginal( pcall( original, ... ) )
-		end
-
-	end )
-end
-
-local detours = {
-	"init", -- "base.init" (runs before init())
-	"tick", -- "base.tick" (runs before tick())
-	"update", -- "base.update" (runs before update())
-}
-for i = 1, #detours do
-	simple_detour( detours[i] )
-end
-
---- Tests if a UI element should be drawn.
----
----@param kind string
----@return boolean
-function shoulddraw( kind )
-	return hook.saferun( "api.shoulddraw", kind ) ~= false
-end
-
-DETOUR( "draw", function( original )
-	return function( dt )
-		if shoulddraw( "all" ) then
-			hook.saferun( "base.predraw", dt )
-			if shoulddraw( "original" ) then
-				checkoriginal( pcall( original, dt ) )
-			end
-			hook.saferun( "base.draw", dt )
-		end
-	end
-
-end )
-
-DETOUR( "Command", function( original )
-	return function( cmd, ... )
-		hook.saferun( "base.precmd", cmd, { ... } )
-		local a, b, c, d, e, f = original( cmd, ... )
-		hook.saferun( "base.postcmd", cmd, { ... }, { a, b, c, d, e, f } )
-	end
-
-end )
-
------- QUICKSAVE WORKAROUND -----
--- Quicksaving stores a copy of the global table without functions, so libraries get corrupted on quickload
--- This code prevents this by overriding them back
-
-local saved = {}
-
-local function hasfunction( t, bck )
-	if bck[t] then
-		return
-	end
-	bck[t] = true
-	for k, v in pairs( t ) do
-		if type( v ) == "function" then
-			return true
-		end
-		if type( v ) == "table" and hasfunction( v, bck ) then
-			return true
-		end
-	end
-end
-
---- Updates the list of libraries known by the Quickload Patch.
-function UpdateQuickloadPatch()
-	for k, v in pairs( _G ) do
-		if k ~= "_G" and type( v ) == "table" and hasfunction( v, {} ) then
-			saved[k] = v
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-local quickloadfix = function()
-	for k, v in pairs( saved ) do
-		_G[k] = v
-	end
-end
-
-DETOUR( "handleCommand", function( original )
-	return function( command, ... )
-		if command == "quickload" then
-			quickloadfix()
-		end
-		hook.saferun( "base.command." .. command, ... )
-		return original( command, ... )
-	end
-end )
-
---------------------------------
-
-hook.add( "base.tick", "api.firsttick", function()
-	hook.remove( "base.tick", "api.firsttick" )
-	hook.saferun( "api.firsttick" )
-	if type( firsttick ) == "function" then
-		firsttick()
-	end
-end )
-
- end)();
---src/core/hooks_extra.lua
-(function() ----------------
--- @submodule core.hooks_base
-
---- Checks if the player is in a vehicle.
----
----@return boolean
-function IsPlayerInVehicle()
-	return GetBool( "game.player.usevehicle" )
-end
-
-local tool = GetString( "game.player.tool" )
-local invehicle = IsPlayerInVehicle()
-
-local keyboardkeys = { "esc", "up", "down", "left", "right", "space", "interact", "return" }
-for i = 97, 97 + 25 do
-	keyboardkeys[#keyboardkeys + 1] = string.char( i )
-end
-local function checkkeys( func, mousehook, keyhook )
-	if hook.used( keyhook ) and func( "any" ) then
-		for i = 1, #keyboardkeys do
-			if func( keyboardkeys[i] ) then
-				hook.saferun( keyhook, keyboardkeys[i] )
-			end
-		end
-	end
-	if hook.used( mousehook ) then
-		if func( "lmb" ) then
-			hook.saferun( mousehook, "lmb" )
-		end
-		if func( "rmb" ) then
-			hook.saferun( mousehook, "rmb" )
-		end
-	end
-end
-
-local mousekeys = { "lmb", "rmb", "mmb" }
-local heldkeys = {}
-
-hook.add( "base.tick", "api.default_hooks", function()
-	if InputLastPressedKey then
-		for i = 1, #mousekeys do
-			local k = mousekeys[i]
-			if InputPressed( k ) then
-				hook.saferun( "api.mouse.pressed", k )
-			elseif InputReleased( k ) then
-				hook.saferun( "api.mouse.released", k )
-			end
-		end
-		local lastkey = InputLastPressedKey()
-		if lastkey ~= "" then
-			heldkeys[lastkey] = true
-			hook.saferun( "api.key.pressed", lastkey )
-		end
-		for key in pairs( heldkeys ) do
-			if not InputDown( key ) then
-				heldkeys[key] = nil
-				hook.saferun( "api.key.released", key )
-				break
-			end
-		end
-		local wheel = InputValue( "mousewheel" )
-		if wheel ~= 0 then
-			hook.saferun( "api.mouse.wheel", wheel )
-		end
-		local mousedx = InputValue( "mousedx" )
-		local mousedy = InputValue( "mousedy" )
-		if mousedx ~= 0 or mousedy ~= 0 then
-			hook.saferun( "api.mouse.move", mousedx, mousedy )
-		end
-	elseif InputPressed then
-		checkkeys( InputPressed, "api.mouse.pressed", "api.key.pressed" )
-		checkkeys( InputReleased, "api.mouse.released", "api.key.released" )
-		local wheel = InputValue( "mousewheel" )
-		if wheel ~= 0 then
-			hook.saferun( "api.mouse.wheel", wheel )
-		end
-		local mousedx = InputValue( "mousedx" )
-		local mousedy = InputValue( "mousedy" )
-		if mousedx ~= 0 or mousedy ~= 0 then
-			hook.saferun( "api.mouse.move", mousedx, mousedy )
-		end
-	end
-
-	local n_invehicle = IsPlayerInVehicle()
-	if invehicle ~= n_invehicle then
-		hook.saferun( n_invehicle and "api.player.enter_vehicle" or "api.player.exit_vehicle",
-		              n_invehicle and GetPlayerVehicle() )
-		invehicle = n_invehicle
-	end
-
-	local n_tool = GetString( "game.player.tool" )
-	if tool ~= n_tool then
-		hook.saferun( "api.player.switch_tool", n_tool, tool )
-		tool = n_tool
-	end
-end )
-
- end)();
---src/util/registry.lua
-(function() ----------------
--- Registry Utilities
--- @script util.registry
-local coreloaded = UMF_SOFTREQUIRE "src/core/_index.lua"
-
-util = util or {}
-
-do
-	local serialize_any, serialize_table
-
-	serialize_table = function( val, bck )
-		if bck[val] then
-			return "nil"
-		end
-		bck[val] = true
-		local entries = {}
-		for k, v in pairs( val ) do
-			entries[#entries + 1] = string.format( "[%s] = %s", serialize_any( k, bck ), serialize_any( v, bck ) )
-		end
-		return string.format( "{%s}", table.concat( entries, "," ) )
-	end
-
-	serialize_any = function( val, bck )
-		local vtype = type( val )
-		if vtype == "table" then
-			return serialize_table( val, bck )
-		elseif vtype == "string" then
-			return string.format( "%q", val )
-		elseif vtype == "function" or vtype == "userdata" then
-			return string.format( "nil --[[%s]]", tostring( val ) )
-		else
-			return tostring( val )
-		end
-	end
-
-	--- Serializes something to a lua-like string.
-	---
-	---@vararg any
-	---@return string
-	function util.serialize( ... )
-		local result = {}
-		for i = 1, select( "#", ... ) do
-			result[i] = serialize_any( select( i, ... ), {} )
-		end
-		return table.concat( result, "," )
-	end
-end
-
---- Unserializes something from a lua-like string.
----
----@param dt string
----@return ...
-function util.unserialize( dt )
-	local fn = loadstring( "return " .. dt )
-	if fn then
-		setfenv( fn, {} )
-		return fn()
-	end
-end
-
-do
-	local function serialize_any( val, bck )
-		local vtype = type( val )
-		if vtype == "table" then
-			if bck[val] then
-				return "{}"
-			end
-			bck[val] = true
-			local len = 0
-			for k, v in pairs( val ) do
-				len = len + 1
-			end
-			local rt = {}
-			if len == #val then
-				for i = 1, #val do
-					rt[i] = serialize_any( val[i], bck )
-				end
-				return string.format( "[%s]", table.concat( rt, "," ) )
-			else
-				for k, v in pairs( val ) do
-					if type( k ) == "string" or type( k ) == "number" then
-						rt[#rt + 1] = string.format( "%s: %s", serialize_any( k, bck ), serialize_any( v, bck ) )
-					end
-				end
-				return string.format( "{%s}", table.concat( rt, "," ) )
-			end
-		elseif vtype == "string" then
-			return string.format( "%q", val )
-		elseif vtype == "function" or vtype == "userdata" or vtype == "nil" then
-			return "null"
-		else
-			return tostring( val )
-		end
-	end
-
-	--- Serializes something to a JSON string.
-	---
-	---@param val any
-	---@return string
-	function util.serializeJSON( val )
-		return serialize_any( val, {} )
-	end
-end
-
---- Creates a buffer shared via the registry.
----
----@param name string
----@param max? number
----@return table
-function util.shared_buffer( name, max )
-	max = max or 64
-	return {
-		_pos_name = name .. ".position",
-		_list_name = name .. ".list.",
-		push = function( self, text )
-			local cpos = GetInt( self._pos_name )
-			SetString( self._list_name .. (cpos % max), text )
-			SetInt( self._pos_name, cpos + 1 )
-		end,
-		len = function( self )
-			return math.min( GetInt( self._pos_name ), max )
-		end,
-		pos = function( self )
-			return GetInt( self._pos_name )
-		end,
-		get = function( self, index )
-			local pos = GetInt( self._pos_name )
-			local len = math.min( pos, max )
-			if index >= len then
-				return
-			end
-			return GetString( self._list_name .. (pos + index - len) % max )
-		end,
-		iterator = function( self )
-			local pos = GetInt( self._pos_name )
-			local len = math.min( pos, max )
-			return function( _, i )
-				i = (i or 0) + 1
-				if i >= len then
-					return
-				end
-				return i, GetString( self._list_name .. (pos + i - len) % max )
-			end
-		end,
-		get_g = function( self, index )
-			return GetString( self._list_name .. (index % max) )
-		end,
-		clear = function( self )
-			SetInt( self._pos_name, 0 )
-			ClearKey( self._list_name:sub( 1, -2 ) )
-		end,
-	}
-end
-
-if coreloaded then
-	--- Creates a channel shared via the registry.
-	---
-	---@param name string Name of the channel.
-	---@param max? number Maximum amount of unread messages in the channel.
-	---@param local_realm? string Name to use to identify the local recipient.
-	---@return table
-	function util.shared_channel( name, max, local_realm )
-		max = max or 64
-		local channel = {
-			_buffer = util.shared_buffer( name, max ),
-			_offset = 0,
-			_hooks = {},
-			_ready_count = 0,
-			_ready = {},
-			broadcast = function( self, ... )
-				return self:send( "", ... )
-			end,
-			send = function( self, realm, ... )
-				self._buffer:push( string.format( ",%s,;%s",
-				                                  (type( realm ) == "table" and table.concat( realm, "," ) or tostring( realm )),
-				                                  util.serialize( ... ) ) )
-			end,
-			listen = function( self, callback )
-				if self._ready[callback] ~= nil then
-					return
-				end
-				self._hooks[#self._hooks + 1] = callback
-				self:ready( callback )
-				return callback
-			end,
-			unlisten = function( self, callback )
-				self:unready( callback )
-				self._ready[callback] = nil
-				for i = 1, #self._hooks do
-					if self._hooks[i] == callback then
-						table.remove( self._hooks, i )
-						return true
-					end
-				end
-			end,
-			ready = function( self, callback )
-				if not self._ready[callback] then
-					self._ready_count = self._ready_count + 1
-					self._ready[callback] = true
-				end
-			end,
-			unready = function( self, callback )
-				if self._ready[callback] then
-					self._ready_count = self._ready_count - 1
-					self._ready[callback] = false
-				end
-			end,
-		}
-		local_realm = "," .. (local_realm or "unknown") .. ","
-		local function receive( ... )
-			for i = 1, #channel._hooks do
-				local f = channel._hooks[i]
-				if channel._ready[f] then
-					f( channel, ... )
-				end
-			end
-		end
-		hook.add( "base.tick", name, function( dt )
-			if channel._ready_count > 0 then
-				local last_pos = channel._buffer:pos()
-				if last_pos > channel._offset then
-					for i = math.max( channel._offset, last_pos - max ), last_pos - 1 do
-						local message = channel._buffer:get_g( i )
-						local start = message:find( ";", 1, true )
-						local realms = message:sub( 1, start - 1 )
-						if realms == ",," or realms:find( local_realm, 1, true ) then
-							receive( util.unserialize( message:sub( start + 1 ) ) )
-							if channel._ready_count <= 0 then
-								channel._offset = i + 1
-								return
-							end
-						end
-					end
-					channel._offset = last_pos
-				end
-			end
-		end )
-		return channel
-	end
-
-	--- Creates an async reader on a channel for coroutines.
-	---
-	---@param channel table Name of the channel.
-	---@return table
-	function util.async_channel( channel )
-		local listener = {
-			_channel = channel,
-			_waiter = nil,
-			read = function( self )
-				self._waiter = coroutine.running()
-				if not self._waiter then
-					error( "async_channel:read() can only be used in a coroutine" )
-				end
-				self._channel:ready( self._handler )
-				return coroutine.yield()
-			end,
-			close = function( self )
-				if self._handler then
-					self._channel:unlisten( self._handler )
-				end
-			end,
-		}
-		listener._handler = listener._channel:listen( function( _, ... )
-			if listener._waiter then
-				local co = listener._waiter
-				listener._waiter = nil
-				listener._channel:unready( listener._handler )
-				return coroutine.resume( co, ... )
-			end
-		end )
-		listener._channel:unready( listener._handler )
-		return listener
-	end
-end
-
-do
-
-	local gets, sets = {}, {}
-
-	--- Registers a type unserializer.
-	---
-	---@param type string
-	---@param callback fun(data: string): any
-	function util.register_unserializer( type, callback )
-		gets[type] = function( key )
-			return callback( GetString( key ) )
-		end
-	end
-
-	if coreloaded then
-		hook.add( "api.newmeta", "api.createunserializer", function( name, meta )
-			gets[name] = function( key )
-				return setmetatable( {}, meta ):__unserialize( GetString( key ) )
-			end
-			sets[name] = function( key, value )
-				return SetString( key, meta.__serialize( value ) )
-			end
-		end )
-	end
-
-	--- Creates a table shared via the registry.
-	---
-	---@param name string
-	---@param base? table
-	---@return table
-	function util.shared_table( name, base )
-		return setmetatable( base or {}, {
-			__index = function( self, k )
-				local key = tostring( k )
-				local vtype = GetString( string.format( "%s.%s.type", name, key ) )
-				if vtype == "" then
-					return
-				end
-				return gets[vtype]( string.format( "%s.%s.val", name, key ) )
-			end,
-			__newindex = function( self, k, v )
-				local vtype = type( v )
-				local handler = sets[vtype]
-				if not handler then
-					return
-				end
-				local key = tostring( k )
-				if vtype == "table" then
-					local meta = getmetatable( v )
-					if meta and meta.__serialize and meta.__type then
-						vtype = meta.__type
-						v = meta.__serialize( v )
-						handler = sets.string
-					end
-				end
-				SetString( string.format( "%s.%s.type", name, key ), vtype )
-				handler( string.format( "%s.%s.val", name, key ), v )
-			end,
-		} )
-	end
-
-	--- Creates a table shared via the registry with a structure.
-	---
-	---@param name string
-	---@param base table
-	---@return table
-	---@overload fun(name: string): fun(base: table): table
-	function util.structured_table( name, base )
-		local function generate( base )
-			local root = {}
-			local keys = {}
-			for k, v in pairs( base ) do
-				local key = name .. "." .. tostring( k )
-				if type( v ) == "table" then
-					if #v == 0 then
-						root[k] = util.structured_table( key, v )
-					else
-						keys[k] = { type = v[1], key = key, default = v[2] }
-					end
-				elseif type( v ) == "string" then
