```diff
----comment
----@param tb table table to check
----@param value any Check if value is in tb.
 function TableInsertUnique(tb, value)
     if not TableContainsValue(tb, value) then
         table.insert(tb, value)
     end
 end
 
-
 function string_pad(str1, pad)
     local format = "%-" .. (pad or 20) .. "s"
     return string.format(format, str1)
 end
 
-
--- Add random value to number within range of number +/- width.
----@param number number
----@param width number Example, RandomSpread(10, 5) maximum range = 5 to 15.
----@return number number number with spread applied.
----@return number spread spread value independant of number.
 function RandomSpread(number, width)
     local spread = (((math.random()-0.5)*2) * width)
     return number + spread, spread
 end
 
-
--- Add random value to number within range of number.
----@param number number
----@param spread_percentage number 0.0 to 0.1
----@return number number number with spread applied.
----@return number spread spread value independant of number.
 function RandomSpreadPercent(number, spread_percentage)
     local spread = ((math.random()-0.5)*2) * (number*(spread_percentage or 1))
     return number + spread, spread
 end

@@ -196,37 +85,9 @@

---[[
--- Add random value to number within range of number.
----@param number number
----@param spread_percentage number 0.0 to 0.1
----@return number number number with spread applied.
-function RandomSpreadPercent(number, spread_percentage, iterations)
-    local n = number
-    for i = 1, iterations or 1 do
-        n = ((math.random()-0.5)*2) * (n*(spread_percentage or 1))
-    end
-    return n
-end
-
-
-function RandomSpreadPercent25(number, iterations)
-    return RandomSpreadPercent(number, 0.25, iterations)
-end
-
-function RandomSpreadPercent50(number, iterations)
-    return RandomSpreadPercent(number, 0.5, iterations)
-end
-
-function RandomSpreadPercent75(number, iterations)
-    return RandomSpreadPercent(number, 0.75, iterations)
-end
-]]
-
-
--- Source: Open Ai
 function string_contains(str, substring)
     local pattern = substring:gsub("[%^%$%(%)%%%.%[%]%*%+%-%?]", "%%%1")
     local _, endIndex = string.find(str, pattern)
     return endIndex ~= nil
 end
+
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\TDSU\util_math.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\scripts\TDSU\util_math.lua
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\TDSU\util_math.lua
@@ -1,116 +1,17 @@
---[[MATH]]
-do
-
-    -- If n is less than zero, return a small number.
-    function GTZero(n) if n <= 0 then return 1/math.huge end return n end
-
-    -- Return a positive non-zero number if n == 0.
-    function NZero(n) if n == 0 then return 1/math.huge end return n end
-
-    ---Return a random number.
-    function Random(min, max) return math.random(min, max - 1) + math.random() end
-
-    ---Contrain a number between two numbers.
-    function Clamp(value, min, max)
-        if value < min then value = min end
-        if value > max then value = max end
-        return value
-    end
-
-    ---Oscillate a value between 0 and 1 based on time.
-    ---@param time number Seconds to complete a oscillation period.
-    function Oscillate(time)
-        local a = ((-1/2) * math.cos(2 * math.pi * GetTime()/(time or 1))) + 0.5
-        return a
-    end
-
-    ---Linear interpolation between two values.
-    function Lerp(a,b,t) return a + (b-a) * 0.5 * t end
-
-    ---Round a number to n decimals.
-    function Round(x, n)
-        n = 10 ^ (n or 0)
-        x = x * n
-        if x >= 0 then x = math.floor(x + 0.5) else x = math.ceil(x - 0.5) end
-        return x / n
-    end
-
-    ---Approach a value at a specified rate.
-    function ApproachValue(value, target, rate)
-        if value >= target then
-
-            if value - rate < target then
-                return target
-            else
-                return value - rate
-            end
-
-        elseif value < target then
-
-            if value + rate > target then
-                return target
-            else
```

```diff
-    -- Normalized dir to quat.

-        local d = {bv[1], bv[2], bv[3]}

-    end

-    function QuatLookDown() return DirToQuat(Vec(0, -1, 0)) end -- Quat facing world-down.
-
-    function QuatTrLookUp(tr) return QuatLookAt(tr.pos, TransformToParentPoint(tr, Vec(0,1,0))) end -- Quat look above tr.
-    function QuatTrLookDown(tr) return QuatLookAt(tr.pos, TransformToParentPoint(tr, Vec(0,-1,0))) end -- Quat look below tr.
-    function QuatTrLookLeft(tr) return QuatLookAt(tr.pos, TransformToParentPoint(tr, Vec(-1,0,0))) end -- Quat look left of tr.
-    function QuatTrLookRight(tr) return QuatLookAt(tr.pos, TransformToParentPoint(tr, Vec(1,0,0))) end -- Quat look right of tr.
-    function QuatTrLookBack(tr) return QuatLookAt(tr.pos, TransformToParentPoint(tr, Vec(0,0,1))) end -- Quat look behind tr.
-
-end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\scripts\TDSU\util_vec.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+++ patched/TABS\scripts\TDSU\util_vec.lua
@@ -1,297 +1,8 @@
---[[VECTORS]]
-do
-    --- Distance between two vectors.
-    VecDist = function(v1, v2) return VecLength(VecSub(v1, v2)) end
-
-    --- Divide a vector by another vector's components.
-    VecDiv = function(v1, v2) return Vec(v1[1] / v2[1], v1[2] / v2[2], v1[3] / v2[3]) end
-
-    VecMult = function(v1, v2)
-        local v = Vec(0,0,0)
-        for i = 1, 3 do v[i] = v1[i] * v2[i] end
-        return v
-    end
-
-    --- Add a table of vectors together.
-    VecAddAll = function(tb_vecs) local v = Vec(0,0,0) for i = 1, #tb_vecs do VecAdd(v, tb_vecs[i]) end return v end
-
-    --- Returns a vector with random values.
-    VecRandom = function(length)
-        local v = VecNormalize(Vec(math.random(-10000000,10000000), math.random(-10000000,10000000), math.random(-10000000,10000000)))
-        return VecScale(v, length)
-    end
-
-    -- Return each min component.
-    function VecMin(v1, v2)
-        local v = Vec(0,0,0)
-        for i = 1, 3 do
-            v[i] = math.min(v1[i], v2[i])
-        end
-        return v
-    end
-
-    -- Return each max component.
-    function VecMax(v1, v2)
-        local v = Vec(0,0,0)
-        for i = 1, 3 do
-            v[i] = math.max(v1[i], v2[i])
-        end
-        return v
-    end
-
-    --- Print QuatEulers or vectors.

-
-        local str = (label or "")
-
-        str = string_append(str, sfn(vec[1], decimals))
-        str = string_append(str, sfn(vec[2], decimals), ", ")
-        str = string_append(str, sfn(vec[3], decimals), ", ")
-
-        str = string_enclose(str, "{", " }")
-
-        -- DebugPrint(str)
-        print(str)
-
-    end
-
-    ---Move a point towards another point for a specified distance.
-    VecApproach = function(vec_start, vec_end, dist)

-    end
-
-    ---Average vector between two vectors.

-    ---Return the x value of a Vec.

-
-    ---Return the y value of a Vec.

-
-    ---Return the z value of a Vec.
-    vz = function(v) return v[3] or v.z end
-
-    ---Takes a table a like { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 } and converts it to Vec(0,0,0)
-    ToVec = function(v) return Vec(v.x, v.y, v.z) end
-
-    ---Takes a Vec like and Vec(0,0,0) converts it to { x = 0, y = 0, z = 0 }
-    ToCompVec = function(v) return { x = v[1], y = v[2], z = v[3] } end
-
-    TransformAdd = function(tr1, tr2)
-        return Transform(VecAdd(tr1.pos, tr2.pos), QuatRotateQuat(tr1.rot, tr2.rot))
-    end
-
-    TransformAdd = function(tr1, tr2)

-    end
-
-end
-
-
---[[AABB]]
-do
-    AabbDimensions = function(min, max) return Vec(max[1] - min[1], max[2] - min[2], max[3] - min[3]) end
-    AabbDraw = function(v1, v2, r, g, b, a)
-        r = r or 1 g = g or 1 b = b or 1 a = a or 1
-        local x1 = v1[1] local y1 = v1[2] local z1 = v1[3] local x2 = v2[1] local y2 = v2[2] local z2 = v2[3]

-    end
-    AabbCheckOverlap = function(aMin, aMax, bMin, bMax)

-        (aMin[1] <= bMax[1] and aMax[1] >= bMin[1]) and

-    end

-    end

-        local shapeAabbMin, shapeAabbMax = GetShapeBounds(shape)

-
-        local closestEdge = edges[1] -- find closest edge
-        local index = 1
-        for i = 1, #edges do

-

-            if edgeDist < closesEdgeDist then
-                closestEdge = edge
-                index = i
-            end
-        end
-        return closestEdge, index
-    end
-    --- Sort edges by closest to startPos and closest to endPos. Return sorted table.

-        local s, startIndex = aabbClosestEdge(startPos, edges)
-        local e, endIndex = aabbClosestEdge(endPos, edges)
-        --- Swap first index with startPos and last index with endPos. Everything between stays same.
-        edges = tableSwapIndex(edges, 1, startIndex)
-        edges = tableSwapIndex(edges, #edges, endIndex)
-        return edges
-    end
-
-
-
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Alashya\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\BRDM\brdm AS.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Alashya\Cold War\Tanks\IFV\bmp\BMP.lua

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Alashya\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\T-62\T-62.lua

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Alashya\Cold War\Tanks\Medium Tanks\T-34\T-44 Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\Centurion\Centurion Series.lua

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Artillery\AA Guns\Vickers K\Vickers K.lua

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\AEC Armoured Car\sg.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\AEC Armoured Car\sg.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\AEC Armoured Car\sg.lua
@@ -1,15 +1,13 @@
-function init()
-	  m1 = FindJoint("gung")
-	   m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
-
-   end
-
-function tick(dt)
-
-	aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
-	
-	SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
-
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    m1 = FindJoint("gung")
+     m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
 end
 
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
+        SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
+    end
+end
 

```

```diff
-	SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
-end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\T17E1 Staghound\sg.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\T17E1 Staghound\sg.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Armoured Cars\T17E1 Staghound\sg.lua
@@ -1,15 +1,13 @@
-function init()
-	  m1 = FindJoint("gung")
-	   m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
-
-   end
-
-function tick(dt)
-
-	aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
-	
-	SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
-
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    m1 = FindJoint("gung")
+     m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
 end
 
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
+        SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
+    end
+end
 

```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Land Lease\Chaffee\Chaffee.lua

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\A17 Tetrarch\Tetrarch.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\Crusader\sg.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\Crusader\sg.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\Crusader\sg.lua
@@ -1,15 +1,13 @@
-function init()
-	  m1 = FindJoint("gung")
-	   m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
-
-   end
-
-function tick(dt)
-
-	aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
-	
-	SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
-
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    m1 = FindJoint("gung")
+     m2 = FindJoint("sightg")
 end
 
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        aa = GetJointMovement(m1)
+        SetJointMotorTarget(m2, aa, 1)
+    end
+end
 

```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Commonwealth\WW2\Tanks\Medium Tanks\Ram\Ram Tanks.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Denmark\Cold War\Tanks\APC\M113 DK\M113dk.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Denmark\Cold War\Tanks\APC\M113 DK\M113dk.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Denmark\Cold War\Tanks\APC\M113 DK\M113dk.lua
@@ -1,149 +1,7 @@
-#include "../../../../../../vehicle_init.lua"
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    local v = FindVehicle("TABS")
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
+end
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Finland\ww2\tanks\tank destroyers\stug\Stug III Series FIN.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\French\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\AMR 35\AMR 35.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Germany\Cold War\Tanks\IFV\Marder\Marder.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Germany\Cold War\Tanks\Light Tanks\Exports\M41\lekpz M41 .lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Germany\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\Exports\T-72\T72.lua

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Germany\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\Leopard 2\Leopard 2.lua

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Germany\WW2\Tanks\Captured tanks\KW Series\KW Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Israel\Cold war\Artillery\Weapons.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Italy\WW2\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Trucks\Lancia\Lancia 3ro\Lancia 3ro.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Japan\WW2\Artillery\Weapons.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+#version 2
+function server.init()

+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
+end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Manulistan\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Manulistan\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Manulistan\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua
@@ -1,150 +1,134 @@
-function init()
-Marker = LoadSprite("MOD/sprite/crossedover.png")
-
-MortarBody = FindBody("Mortar")
-
-Mortar = FindShapes("mortar")
-
-Decrease = FindShape("notraise")
-Increase = FindShape("raise")
-
-SpawnLight = FindLight("Spawn")
-
-Fire = LoadSound("MOD/Snd/2-mortar")
-
-LAYER_A = 1 
-LAYER_B = 2
-LAYER_C = 4
-LAYER_D = 8
-LAYER_E = 16
-LAYER_F = 32
-LAYER_G = 64
-LAYER_H = 128
-EVERY_LAYER = 255
-unloaded = true
-ShotTime = 2
-force1 = 700
-range = 200
-inrange = false
-MM30 = HasTag(MortarBody, "30MM")
-MM45 = HasTag(MortarBody, "45MM")
-
-explosive = 0
-reloadtime = 2
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    Marker = LoadSprite("MOD/sprite/crossedover.png")
+    MortarBody = FindBody("Mortar")
+    Mortar = FindShapes("mortar")
+    Decrease = FindShape("notraise")
+    Increase = FindShape("raise")
+    SpawnLight = FindLight("Spawn")
+    LAYER_A = 1 
+    LAYER_B = 2
+    LAYER_C = 4
+    LAYER_D = 8
+    LAYER_E = 16
+    LAYER_F = 32
+    LAYER_G = 64
+    LAYER_H = 128
+    EVERY_LAYER = 255
+    unloaded = true
+    ShotTime = 2
+    force1 = 700
+    range = 200
+    inrange = false
+    MM30 = HasTag(MortarBody, "30MM")
+    MM45 = HasTag(MortarBody, "45MM")
+    explosive = 0
+    reloadtime = 2
 end
 
-function tick(dt)
-	reloadtime = reloadtime - dt
-	
-	local playerPos = GetPlayerTransform().pos
-	local MORTAROS = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local dist2plaer = VecLength(VecSub(playerPos, MORTAROS))  
-	
-	if dist2plaer < 4 then 
-	
-	inrange = true
-	
-	
-	
-	else
-	inrange = false
-	end
-	
-	if GetPlayerInteractShape() == Decrease and InputPressed("interact") and force1 > 100 then
-	force1 = force1 - 20
-	range = range + 20
-	end
-	if GetPlayerInteractShape() == Increase and InputPressed("interact") and force1 < 800 then
-	force1 = force1 + 20 
-	range = range - 20
-	end
-	
-	Shell = FindShapes("shell", true)
-	ShellBody = FindBodies("Shell")
-	
-	UnloadedAmmos = FindBodies("Ammo", true)
-	for i=1,#UnloadedAmmos do
-	local UnloadedAmmo = UnloadedAmmos[i]
-	local AmmoPos = GetBodyTransform(UnloadedAmmo).pos
-	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local dist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, AmmoPos))  
-	
-	
-	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM30 and reloadtime < 0 then 
-	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "30mm") then
-	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
-	unloaded = false
-	explosive = 1
-	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
-	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell.xml", SpawnPos)
-	ShotTime = .8
-	
-	end
-	end
-	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM45 and reloadtime < 0 then 
-	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "45mm") then
-	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
-	unloaded = false
-	explosive = 1.1
-	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
-	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell2.xml", SpawnPos)
-	ShotTime = 1.5
-	
-	end
-	
-	end
-	end
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	if GetPlayerInteractBody() == MortarBody and InputPressed("interact") and not unloaded then
-	reloadtime = 2
-	local pos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	PlaySound(Fire, pos, 0.5)
-	for i=1,#ShellBody do
-	local ShellBody1 = ShellBody[i]
-	local Shoot = HasTag(ShellBody1, "Shot")
-	if not shoot then 
-	local t = GetBodyTransform(ShellBody1)
-    local force = 900
-    local fwd = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,2,0))
-    ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd,force))
-	ShotTime = ShotTime - dt
-    local fwd1 = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,-2,0))
-    ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd1,force1))
-	
-	
-	
-	unloaded = true
-	SetTag(ShellBody1, "explosive", explosive)
-	RemoveTag(ShellBody1, "Shell")
-	local Debri = FindBodies("debri", true)
-	for i=1,#Debri do
-	local debri = Debri[i]
-	local Shape = GetBodyTransform(debri).pos
-	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local shist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, Shape)) 
-	if shist < 10 then 
-	local number = math.random(1,5)
-	local number1 = math.random(-2,2)
-	local vel = Vec(0,number,-number1)
-	SetBodyVelocity(debri, vel)
-	end
-	end
-	end
-	end
-	end
-for i=1,#Shell do
-SetShapeCollisionFilter(Shell[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
-end
-for i=1,#Mortar do
-SetShapeCollisionFilter(Mortar[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
-end
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        	reloadtime = reloadtime - dt
+        	local playerPos = GetPlayerTransform(playerId).pos
+        	local MORTAROS = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+        	local dist2plaer = VecLength(VecSub(playerPos, MORTAROS))  
+        	if dist2plaer < 4 then 
+
+        	inrange = true
+
+        	else
+        	inrange = false
+        	end
+        	Shell = FindShapes("shell", true)
+        	ShellBody = FindBodies("Shell")
+        	UnloadedAmmos = FindBodies("Ammo", true)
+        	for i=1,#UnloadedAmmos do
+        	local UnloadedAmmo = UnloadedAmmos[i]
+        	local AmmoPos = GetBodyTransform(UnloadedAmmo).pos
+        	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+        	local dist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, AmmoPos))  
+
+        	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM30 and reloadtime < 0 then 
+        	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "30mm") then
+        	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
+        	unloaded = false
+        	explosive = 1
+        	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
+        	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell.xml", SpawnPos)
+        	ShotTime = .8
+
+        	end
+        	end
+        	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM45 and reloadtime < 0 then 
+        	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "45mm") then
+        	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
+        	unloaded = false
+        	explosive = 1.1
+        	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
+        	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell2.xml", SpawnPos)
+        	ShotTime = 1.5
+
+        	end
+
+        	end
+        	end
+        for i=1,#Shell do
+        SetShapeCollisionFilter(Shell[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
+        end
+        for i=1,#Mortar do
+        SetShapeCollisionFilter(Mortar[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
+        end
+    end
 end
 
+function client.init()
+    Fire = LoadSound("MOD/Snd/2-mortar")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == Decrease and InputPressed("interact") and force1 > 100 then
+    force1 = force1 - 20
+    range = range + 20
+    end
+    if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == Increase and InputPressed("interact") and force1 < 800 then
+    force1 = force1 + 20 
+    range = range - 20
+    end
+    if GetPlayerInteractBody(playerId) == MortarBody and InputPressed("interact") and not unloaded then
+    reloadtime = 2
+    local pos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+    PlaySound(Fire, pos, 0.5)
+    for i=1,#ShellBody do
+    local ShellBody1 = ShellBody[i]
+    local Shoot = HasTag(ShellBody1, "Shot")
+    if not shoot then 
+    local t = GetBodyTransform(ShellBody1)
+       local force = 900
+       local fwd = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,2,0))
+       ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd,force))
+    ShotTime = ShotTime - dt
+       local fwd1 = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,-2,0))
+       ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd1,force1))
+
+    unloaded = true
+    SetTag(ShellBody1, "explosive", explosive)
+    RemoveTag(ShellBody1, "Shell")
+    local Debri = FindBodies("debri", true)
+    for i=1,#Debri do
+    local debri = Debri[i]
+    local Shape = GetBodyTransform(debri).pos
+    local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+    local shist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, Shape)) 
+    if shist < 10 then 
+    local number = math.random(1,5)
+    local number1 = math.random(-2,2)
+    local vel = Vec(0,number,-number1)
+    SetBodyVelocity(debri, vel)
+    end
+    end
+    end
+    end
+    end
+end
+

```

---

```diff
-				NV_Color_B = .5,

-

-

-end
```

- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\Cold War\Cars, Trucks, Tractors & Halftracks\Cars\Military Cars\GAZ2330\Mortar.lua
@@ -1,150 +1,134 @@
-function init()
-Marker = LoadSprite("MOD/sprite/crossedover.png")
-
-MortarBody = FindBody("Mortar")
-
-Mortar = FindShapes("mortar")
-
-Decrease = FindShape("notraise")
-Increase = FindShape("raise")
-
-SpawnLight = FindLight("Spawn")
-
-Fire = LoadSound("MOD/Snd/2-mortar")
-
-LAYER_A = 1 
-LAYER_B = 2
-LAYER_C = 4
-LAYER_D = 8
-LAYER_E = 16
-LAYER_F = 32
-LAYER_G = 64
-LAYER_H = 128
-EVERY_LAYER = 255
-unloaded = true
-ShotTime = 2
-force1 = 700
-range = 200
-inrange = false
-MM30 = HasTag(MortarBody, "30MM")
-MM45 = HasTag(MortarBody, "45MM")
-
-explosive = 0
-reloadtime = 2
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    Marker = LoadSprite("MOD/sprite/crossedover.png")
+    MortarBody = FindBody("Mortar")
+    Mortar = FindShapes("mortar")
+    Decrease = FindShape("notraise")
+    Increase = FindShape("raise")
+    SpawnLight = FindLight("Spawn")
+    LAYER_A = 1 
+    LAYER_B = 2
+    LAYER_C = 4
+    LAYER_D = 8
+    LAYER_E = 16
+    LAYER_F = 32
+    LAYER_G = 64
+    LAYER_H = 128
+    EVERY_LAYER = 255
+    unloaded = true
+    ShotTime = 2
+    force1 = 700
+    range = 200
+    inrange = false
+    MM30 = HasTag(MortarBody, "30MM")
+    MM45 = HasTag(MortarBody, "45MM")
+    explosive = 0
+    reloadtime = 2
 end
 
-function tick(dt)
-	reloadtime = reloadtime - dt
-	
-	local playerPos = GetPlayerTransform().pos
-	local MORTAROS = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local dist2plaer = VecLength(VecSub(playerPos, MORTAROS))  
-	
-	if dist2plaer < 4 then 
-	
-	inrange = true
-	
-	
-	
-	else
-	inrange = false
-	end
-	
-	if GetPlayerInteractShape() == Decrease and InputPressed("interact") and force1 > 100 then
-	force1 = force1 - 20
-	range = range + 20
-	end
-	if GetPlayerInteractShape() == Increase and InputPressed("interact") and force1 < 800 then
-	force1 = force1 + 20 
-	range = range - 20
-	end
-	
-	Shell = FindShapes("shell", true)
-	ShellBody = FindBodies("Shell")
-	
-	UnloadedAmmos = FindBodies("Ammo", true)
-	for i=1,#UnloadedAmmos do
-	local UnloadedAmmo = UnloadedAmmos[i]
-	local AmmoPos = GetBodyTransform(UnloadedAmmo).pos
-	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local dist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, AmmoPos))  
-	
-	
-	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM30 and reloadtime < 0 then 
-	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "30mm") then
-	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
-	unloaded = false
-	explosive = 1
-	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
-	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell.xml", SpawnPos)
-	ShotTime = .8
-	
-	end
-	end
-	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM45 and reloadtime < 0 then 
-	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "45mm") then
-	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
-	unloaded = false
-	explosive = 1.1
-	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
-	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell2.xml", SpawnPos)
-	ShotTime = 1.5
-	
-	end
-	
-	end
-	end
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	
-	if GetPlayerInteractBody() == MortarBody and InputPressed("interact") and not unloaded then
-	reloadtime = 2
-	local pos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	PlaySound(Fire, pos, 0.5)
-	for i=1,#ShellBody do
-	local ShellBody1 = ShellBody[i]
-	local Shoot = HasTag(ShellBody1, "Shot")
-	if not shoot then 
-	local t = GetBodyTransform(ShellBody1)
-    local force = 900
-    local fwd = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,2,0))
-    ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd,force))
-	ShotTime = ShotTime - dt
-    local fwd1 = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,-2,0))
-    ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd1,force1))
-	
-	
-	
-	unloaded = true
-	SetTag(ShellBody1, "explosive", explosive)
-	RemoveTag(ShellBody1, "Shell")
-	local Debri = FindBodies("debri", true)
-	for i=1,#Debri do
-	local debri = Debri[i]
-	local Shape = GetBodyTransform(debri).pos
-	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
-	local shist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, Shape)) 
-	if shist < 10 then 
-	local number = math.random(1,5)
-	local number1 = math.random(-2,2)
-	local vel = Vec(0,number,-number1)
-	SetBodyVelocity(debri, vel)
-	end
-	end
-	end
-	end
-	end
-for i=1,#Shell do
-SetShapeCollisionFilter(Shell[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
-end
-for i=1,#Mortar do
-SetShapeCollisionFilter(Mortar[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
-end
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        	reloadtime = reloadtime - dt
+        	local playerPos = GetPlayerTransform(playerId).pos
+        	local MORTAROS = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+        	local dist2plaer = VecLength(VecSub(playerPos, MORTAROS))  
+        	if dist2plaer < 4 then 
+
+        	inrange = true
+
+        	else
+        	inrange = false
+        	end
+        	Shell = FindShapes("shell", true)
+        	ShellBody = FindBodies("Shell")
+        	UnloadedAmmos = FindBodies("Ammo", true)
+        	for i=1,#UnloadedAmmos do
+        	local UnloadedAmmo = UnloadedAmmos[i]
+        	local AmmoPos = GetBodyTransform(UnloadedAmmo).pos
+        	local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+        	local dist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, AmmoPos))  
+
+        	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM30 and reloadtime < 0 then 
+        	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "30mm") then
+        	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
+        	unloaded = false
+        	explosive = 1
+        	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
+        	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell.xml", SpawnPos)
+        	ShotTime = .8
+
+        	end
+        	end
+        	if dist < 1 and unloaded and MM45 and reloadtime < 0 then 
+        	if HasTag(UnloadedAmmo, "45mm") then
+        	Delete(UnloadedAmmo)
+        	unloaded = false
+        	explosive = 1.1
+        	SpawnPos = GetLightTransform(SpawnLight)
+        	Spawn("MOD/MortarShell2.xml", SpawnPos)
+        	ShotTime = 1.5
+
+        	end
+
+        	end
+        	end
+        for i=1,#Shell do
+        SetShapeCollisionFilter(Shell[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
+        end
+        for i=1,#Mortar do
+        SetShapeCollisionFilter(Mortar[i], LAYER_B, EVERY_LAYER - LAYER_B)
+        end
+    end
 end
 
+function client.init()
+    Fire = LoadSound("MOD/Snd/2-mortar")
+end
+
+function client.tick(dt)
+    local playerId = GetLocalPlayer()
+    if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == Decrease and InputPressed("interact") and force1 > 100 then
+    force1 = force1 - 20
+    range = range + 20
+    end
+    if GetPlayerInteractShape(playerId) == Increase and InputPressed("interact") and force1 < 800 then
+    force1 = force1 + 20 
+    range = range - 20
+    end
+    if GetPlayerInteractBody(playerId) == MortarBody and InputPressed("interact") and not unloaded then
+    reloadtime = 2
+    local pos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+    PlaySound(Fire, pos, 0.5)
+    for i=1,#ShellBody do
+    local ShellBody1 = ShellBody[i]
+    local Shoot = HasTag(ShellBody1, "Shot")
+    if not shoot then 
+    local t = GetBodyTransform(ShellBody1)
+       local force = 900
+       local fwd = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,2,0))
+       ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd,force))
+    ShotTime = ShotTime - dt
+       local fwd1 = TransformToParentVec(t,Vec(0,-2,0))
+       ApplyBodyImpulse(ShellBody1, t.pos, VecScale(fwd1,force1))
+
+    unloaded = true
+    SetTag(ShellBody1, "explosive", explosive)
+    RemoveTag(ShellBody1, "Shell")
+    local Debri = FindBodies("debri", true)
+    for i=1,#Debri do
+    local debri = Debri[i]
+    local Shape = GetBodyTransform(debri).pos
+    local MortarPos = GetBodyTransform(MortarBody).pos
+    local shist = VecLength(VecSub(MortarPos, Shape)) 
+    if shist < 10 then 
+    local number = math.random(1,5)
+    local number1 = math.random(-2,2)
+    local vel = Vec(0,number,-number1)
+    SetBodyVelocity(debri, vel)
+    end
+    end
+    end
+    end
+    end
+end
+

```

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\T-62\T-62.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Artillery\Artillery\Artillery.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    			SetBool(path.."."..k, s, true)

+    	end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Captured Tanks\T-IV\T-IV.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
@@ -1,347 +1,7 @@
-#include "../../../../../../vehicle_init.lua"
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    local v = FindVehicle("TABS")
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
```

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Captured Tanks\T-V\T-V.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Captured Tanks\T-V\T-V.lua
@@ -1,198 +1,7 @@
-#include "../../../../../../vehicle_init.lua"
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    local v = FindVehicle("TABS")
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
+end
 
-Vehicle = {
-	Ammunition_Fire_Threshold = 55,
-	Ammunition_Detonation_Threshold = 15,
-
-	Language = "russian",
-}
```

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Heavy Tanks & Super Heavy Tanks\KV Series\KV-6.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Lend-Lease Vehicles\A12 Matilda II\A12 Matilda Soviet.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Lend-Lease Vehicles\Churchill\Churchill Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Lend-Lease Vehicles\Stuart\Stuart Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Lend-Lease Vehicles\Valentine\Valentine Tanks Soviet.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\BT Series\BT Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
@@ -1,175 +1,7 @@

+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    local v = FindVehicle("TABS")
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
+end
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\T-60\T-60.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Medium Tanks\T-44\T-44 Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Soviet Union\WW2\Tanks\Tank destroyers\SU-T70\SU-76.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

```diff
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
```

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Sweden\Cold War\Artillery\Weapons SWE.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\Sweden\Cold War\Artillery\Weapons SWE.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\Sweden\Cold War\Artillery\Weapons SWE.lua
@@ -1,98 +1,7 @@
-#include "../../../../vehicle_init.lua"
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    local v = FindVehicle("TABS")
+    VehicleInit(v,Vehicle,Weapons,Optics)
+    SetTag(v, "TABSINIT")
+end
```

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Sweden\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\Strv 103\strv103.lua

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Ukraine\Cold War\Tanks\IFV\bmp\BMP.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\Ukraine\Cold War\Tanks\MBT\T-54 55\T-54 55.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

---

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\United States\Cold war\Tanks\IFV\Bradley\Bradley.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\United States\Cold war\Tanks\Light Tanks\M41 Bulldog\M41.lua

- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\United States\WW2\Artillery\Weapons.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\United States\WW2\Tanks\Light Tanks\Stuart\Stuart Series.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

# Migration Report: TABS\vehicles\United States\WW2\Tanks\Tank destroyers\T55 GMC\joint steering.lua

## Changes Applied
- Added `#version 2` header
- Split callbacks into `server.*` / `client.*` domains
- Applied automatic fixups (handle checks, deprecated functions, playerId)

## Diff

```diff
--- original/TABS\vehicles\United States\WW2\Tanks\Tank destroyers\T55 GMC\joint steering.lua
+++ patched/TABS\vehicles\United States\WW2\Tanks\Tank destroyers\T55 GMC\joint steering.lua
@@ -1,29 +1,27 @@
-function init()
-
-	steerJoints = FindJoints("steeringJoint")
-	
-	vehicle = FindVehicle()
-	
+#version 2
+function server.init()
+    steerJoints = FindJoints("steeringJoint")
+    vehicle = FindVehicle()
 end
 
-function tick()
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        local steering = GetVehicleSteering(vehicle)
+        for i = 1, #steerJoints do
+        	local jointMin, jointMax = GetJointLimits(steerJoints[i])
+        	local jointSpeed = GetTagValue(steerJoints[i], "steeringJoint") or 3
+        	if steering == 0 then
+        		SetJointMotorTarget(steerJoints[i], 0, jointSpeed/2)
+        	else
+        		if GetJointMovement(steerJoints[i]) < 0 and steering < 0 then
+        			jointSpeed = jointSpeed*(3*(1-math.abs(steering)))
+        		elseif GetJointMovement(steerJoints[i]) > 0 and steering ~= 0 then
+        			jointSpeed = jointSpeed*(3*(1-math.abs(steering)))
+        		end
+        		SetJointMotor(steerJoints[i], jointSpeed*(steering))
+        		--DebugPrint("Steering = " ..steering)
+        	end
+        end
+    end
+end
 
-	local steering = GetVehicleSteering(vehicle)
-	
-	for i = 1, #steerJoints do
-		local jointMin, jointMax = GetJointLimits(steerJoints[i])
-		local jointSpeed = GetTagValue(steerJoints[i], "steeringJoint") or 3
-		if steering == 0 then
-			SetJointMotorTarget(steerJoints[i], 0, jointSpeed/2)
-		else
-			if GetJointMovement(steerJoints[i]) < 0 and steering < 0 then
-				jointSpeed = jointSpeed*(3*(1-math.abs(steering)))
-			elseif GetJointMovement(steerJoints[i]) > 0 and steering > 0 then
-				jointSpeed = jointSpeed*(3*(1-math.abs(steering)))
-			end
-			SetJointMotor(steerJoints[i], jointSpeed*(steering))
-			--DebugPrint("Steering = " ..steering)
-		end
-	end
-
-end
```

```diff
+    elseif HasTag(FindVehicle(), "tracksT72") then

+    	stadia3 = LoadLoop("MOD/snd/tracks_3.ogg", 9)

 end
 
-function tick()

-    local speed = math.abs(velZ)
+function server.tick(dt)
+    for _, playerId in ipairs(GetAllPlayers()) do
+        local t = GetBodyTransform(Hull)
+        local velZ = TransformToLocalVec(t, GetBodyVelocity(Hull))[3]
+        local speed = math.abs(velZ)
+        local sndLoopPos = VecAdd(TransformToParentPoint(t, GetBodyCenterOfMass(Hull)), Vec(0, 1, 0))
+    end
+end
 
-    local sndLoopPos = VecAdd(TransformToParentPoint(t, GetBodyCenterOfMass(Hull)), Vec(0, 1, 0))
-
```
